title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Legal, Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

Research and development projects in the health, wellness, and medical product space.

title: Amazon Graphic Designer - Packaging
description:

Prepare rough drafts and present ideas

Use the appropriate colors and layouts for each graphic

Test graphics across various media

Amend designs after feedback

A strong candidate will have at least 3 years of proven work experience in Amazon listing or similar, extensive experience in package box designing and branding, knowledge in photo and video editing, a strong portfolio of illustrations or other graphics, familiarity with design software and technologies (such as InDesign, Illustrator, Dreamweaver, Photoshop), a keen eye for aesthetics and details, excellent communication skills, ability to work methodically and meet deadlines, time management and multitasking abilities, creativity skills and problem-solving aptitude and works best under pressure.

3D experience is required for this role.

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented video editor to help create high-quality, engaging videos. The ideal candidate should have experience working with raw footage from phone recordings and be able to enhance content through expert editing, seamless transitions, and creative additions.



What You'll Do:

1. Tailored Workflow & Enhanced Quality: Optimize raw footage with noise reduction, audio leveling, and effects to elevate overall content quality.

2. Precise Editing & Efficiency: Edit and enhance videos while ensuring quick turnaround times without compromising quality.

3. Professional Video Editing: Deliver precise and creative edits to match the project’s needs.

4. Post-Production: Provide comprehensive post-production services to ensure polished, professional results.

5. Color Correction: Apply color grading and correction to enhance the visual appeal of videos.

6. Sound Design: Add background music, improve audio quality, and create an immersive audio experience.

7. Creative Storytelling: Make decisions on where to insert B-rolls, animations, zoom transitions, and graphics to make videos more engaging.

8. Subtitles & Captions: Add subtitles for accessibility and engagement.

9. Organizing Clips & Footage: Structure videos from beginning to end with a seamless flow.

10. Transitions & Video Effects: Implement smooth transitions and effects for a professional touch.

11. Intro & Outro: Create engaging intros and outros to enhance brand identity.

12. Multiple Revisions: Open to feedback and revisions to achieve the desired final product.



Ideal Candidate:



- Experienced in editing phone-recorded content

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Understands sound design and background music selection

- Proficient in color grading and correction

- Skilled in using professional video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

- Efficient and deadline-driven



If you're passionate about video editing and can transform raw footage into engaging, high-quality content, we'd love to hear from you!



To apply, please send:

1. Examples of past video editing work

2. Are you willing to sign an NDA before getting the materials to edit?

3. Your typical turnaround time for a 3-5 minute video

4. Are you willing to create a short sample? We will provide raw footage for the test.

title: Property Manager with QuickBooks
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Assistant Bookkeeper to support our property management and accounting operations. The ideal candidate will have experience handling financial tasks within a property management environment, including rent collections, bank reconciliations, accounts payable, and tenant renewals. This role requires strong organizational skills, excellent customer service abilities, and proficiency in QuickBooks. The Assistant Bookkeeper will work closely with landlords, tenants, and internal teams to ensure accurate financial records, timely payments, and smooth day-to-day financial operations in a remote setting.



Key Responsibilities

Manage rent collections, track payments, and follow up on outstanding balances



Perform accurate bank reconciliations and maintain up-to-date financial records



Process accounts payable, including vendor invoices and expense tracking



Assist with tenant renewals, lease updates, and financial documentation



Provide professional customer service to tenants, landlords, and vendors



Communicate regularly with remote landlords regarding financial reports and account updates



Maintain organized bookkeeping records in QuickBooks



Reconcile rent rolls, ledgers, and payment reports



Support month-end and year-end closing processes



Monitor financial discrepancies and resolve issues promptly



Assist with financial reporting and data entry as needed



Qualifications

Proven experience in bookkeeping, accounting, or property management accounting



Proficiency in QuickBooks (required)



Experience with bank reconciliation, accounts payable, and rent collections



Strong understanding of tenant renewals and property management financial workflows



Excellent customer service and communication skills



Highly organized with strong attention to detail



Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Strong time management and multitasking skills



Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets is a plus



Preferred Skills

Experience working with remote landlords or property management companies



Knowledge of rent tracking systems or property management software

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written) this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST) no exceptions

title: Creative Executive Assistant
description:

We’re also looking for someone with a creative background such as graphic design, video editing, or visual storytelling. As AI continues to evolve, the tools will keep improving. What matters most is your eye. Your taste, judgment, and creativity are what will set you apart. This is a long-term role with real growth potential for the right person.

You are a reliable, sharp Executive Assistant who also has great taste and a creative eye. You take ownership without being asked, communicate clearly in English, and know how to prioritize what matters most.



You are

Adaptable and eager to learn

Apple ecosystem fluency is a plus. We use iMessage, FaceTime, and native Mac and iPhone apps daily. Owning a MacBook and iPhone is a plus.



What We Offer

A high-trust environment where strong work is recognized



How to Apply

Failure to answer these questions will result in automatic rejection. Attention to detail is essential for this role. We read every application carefully, so please make sure yours reflects what we are looking for.

Data makes decisions.

title: Ebook Creator / Research Writer (Beginner Motorcycle Guide)
description:
We are looking for someone to research, write, and design a comprehensive ebook for beginner motorcyclists. The goal of this ebook is to educate new riders about safety, gear, and what they need to know before getting on a motorcycle.



This project will require strong research skills, clear writing, and the ability to organize information in a structured and easy-to-read format.



Project Overview “Expected timeline: 3–4 weeks”



1. Create a complete ebook for beginner motorcyclists.

2. The ebook must be a minimum of 50 pages.

3. The content should be educational, well researched, and easy for beginners to understand.

4. The final ebook should look clean, professional, and visually organized.



Content Requirements



The ebook should include topics such as:



1. Beginner motorcycle safety fundamentals.

2. Motorcycle gear explained (helmets, visors, gloves, jackets, boots, etc.).

3. How to choose the right gear.

4. My favorite gear as a girl rider, including sizing, measurements, and photos for reference (which will be provided).

5. Things I wish I knew before I started riding.

6. Things to watch out for on the road such as tar snakes, paint lines, gravel, and other hazards.

7. Riding tips and confidence tips for beginner riders.

8. Pre-ride safety checklist.

9. Basic motorcycle maintenance beginners should know.

10. How to meet other riders and make friends in the motorcycle community.

11. Beginner riding drills and exercises that riders can practice in a parking lot to improve control, confidence, braking, and turning skills.

12. Any other helpful guidance for someone new to motorcycles.



Structure Requirements



1. The ebook must include a full table of contents.

2. The information should be broken into clear sections and chapters.

3. Content should be written in a way that is easy for beginners to follow.

4. Visual elements should be used where appropriate.



Design



1. The ebook can be created in Canva.

2. It should be visually appealing and well formatted.

3. Photos will be provided for you to include in the ebook.

4. We will also provide an example ebook for reference.



Research



1. You will be responsible for researching the content.

2. Information should be accurate and helpful for beginner riders.

3. Sources should be credible.



Important Requirements



1. Absolutely no AI-generated content is allowed.

2. All writing must be 100% human-written and original.

3. Content may be checked with AI detection tools.

4. Applicants using AI will be disqualified.



Application Instructions



1. Submit a rough draft table of contents for the beginner motorcycle ebook you would create.

2. Expand one chapter from your table of contents into a detailed outline showing the sections and key points you would cover.

3. Suggest three additional chapters you believe would make the ebook more valuable for beginner riders.

4. Send examples of ebooks or long-form guides you have created before.

5. Briefly explain your experience researching or writing educational content.

6. To confirm you read the entire job listing carefully, include the word “Throttle” somewhere in your table of contents submission.



Applications without previous examples of ebook work will not be considered.



We are looking for someone who can produce a well-researched, professional-quality guide that beginner riders will find genuinely useful. Payment is $450 CAD for the completed eBook.  $50 deposit

$150 after outline approval

$250 after final delivery

title: WordPress Website Designer & Builder (Figma Expert)
description:
WordPress Website Designer & Builder (Figma Expert)

Remote | Full-Time or Part-Time



About the Role

We are looking for a high-level WordPress Website Designer & Builder who is equally strong in website strategy, design, and implementation.

This role is for someone who can genuinely replace the founder’s involvement in website strategy and delivery. You will be responsible for thinking through websites end-to-end, not just designing screens or building pages.



You must be confident owning:



Website structure and planning

Figma-based design systems

Conversion-focused layouts

SEO-aware page hierarchies

WordPress builds using modern, lightweight builders



This is not a hand-holding role. You will be trusted to manage websites from initial structure through to live build.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Website Strategy & Planning

Planning full website structures and sitemaps

Advising on page hierarchy, navigation, and user flow

Designing for conversions, clarity, and business outcomes

Understanding how different site types convert (local services, lead generation, ecommerce)

Structuring sites to support SEO and internal linking



Design (Figma-First)

Designing websites in Figma before any build begins

Creating clean, modern, conversion-focused UI/UX

Establishing consistent design systems (spacing, typography, components)

Translating brand positioning into effective website design



WordPress Build & Implementation

Building approved designs in WordPress using Zion Builder and Bricks Builder

Ensuring clean structure, fast load times, and scalability

Implementing responsive behaviour across all devices

Avoiding bloated plugins and poor development practices



Conversion, SEO & Performance

Applying CRO best practices across layouts and page structures

Implementing on-page SEO fundamentals correctly

Ensuring websites are fast, lightweight, and technically sound



Project Ownership

Managing websites from brief to launch

Coordinating feedback and revisions clearly

Flagging risks, gaps, or improvements early

Delivering work without constant oversight



This Role Is Not a Fit If

You only design or only build

You rely on Elementor or Divi only

You need detailed instructions for every page

You are not confident owning full website strategy



This Role Is a Fit If

You are a Figma expert and strong design systems thinker

You are equally comfortable designing and building

You understand conversion, UX, and SEO as a system

You can plan and execute full websites independently

You communicate clearly and manage your own workload



Required Skills & Experience

Advanced Figma skills (wireframing, prototyping, full designs)

Strong WordPress build experience

Proven experience with Zion Builder and Bricks Builder

Solid understanding of CRO, UX, and SEO fundamentals

Experience designing and building ecommerce and lead-generation websites

Ability to manage multiple website projects concurrently

(Elementor- or Divi-only designers will not be considered.)



Availability & Work Setup

Remote role



Full-time or part-time depending on fit

Must be available for collaboration during AWST business hours

Long-term role for the right person



How to Apply

Apply via OnlineJobs.ph.



Please include:

1. A portfolio of websites you designed and built

2. Live links to websites you personally worked on

3. A short explanation of your experience with Figma, Zion Builder, and Bricks Builder

4. Required question: Briefly explain how you would approach structuring a 10–15 page service-based website to maximise conversions and SEO. You do not need to write copy. We are looking for your thinking around page hierarchy, internal linking, conversion flow, and calls to action.



Applications without real examples of both design and build work, or without an answer to the required question, will not be considered.

title: Elite Appointment Setter (SDR) | Join the Loud House Movement

At Loud House, we don’t just build companies—we create movements. Our vision is to empower people across the globe to rise beyond limitations, connect with purpose, and drive unstoppable growth. We’re building a global network of world-class talent, and this role is at the front line of that vision.

Running world-class discovery conversations that spark interest, build trust, and set quality appointments.

Strong ability to teach, tailor, and take control of conversations.

OTE: 100,000+ PHP Monthly (Base + uncapped bonuses).

Full-time, remote role with long-term growth potential.



A chance to be part of a global movement, not just another company.



Support from a strong, passionate team that has your back.





Important Notes

We’re looking for a full-time commitment—this is not a side hustle.





About Loud House



Since 2022, Loud House is more than a business—it’s a movement. We believe in building something bigger than ourselves, where work is not just about hitting numbers but about creating impact, purpose, and growth for everyone involved. Joining us means being part of a revolution in sales and staffing, where you’ll grow your career while contributing to something transformative.



If you’re ready to bring the energy, the experience, and the heart—this is your chance.



Apply now and let’s build the movement together.

 or something similar.* Thank you!

title: Email & SMS Retention Specialist (AI-Native)
description:
Job Title:
 & SMS Retention Specialist (AI-Native) – Beauty Sleep Club



Salary: $1,500 AUD / month (Paid Monthly)



Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



Website: 



About the Brand



Beauty Sleep Club is a rapidly growing e-commerce brand primarily selling mouth tape to women. We focus on a premium "Beauty Sleep" ritual with over 50,000 customers. We are currently scaling aggressively and need a world-class retention expert to turn our one-time buyers into lifelong subscribers.



The Mission

Your goal is to own the entire customer lifecycle. You will move us away from "batch-and-blast"
s toward a highly personalized, AI-driven retention engine that maximizes Customer Lifetime Value (LTV).



Your Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Revenue Growth: Responsible for driving 30%+ of total store revenue via the
/SMS channel.

Subscription Growth: Convert a minimum of 5-10% of one-time buyers into recurring "Sleep Club" members.

Engagement: Maintain and improve open rates (Target: 40%+) and click-through rates (Target: 3%+).

Flow Performance: Optimize and maintain high-converting automation flows, specifically for Abandoned Carts, Browse Abandonment, and Post-Purchase sequences.

Efficiency: Reduce platform costs by cleaning lists and optimizing SMS/Email credit usage.



Core Responsibilities

Lifecycle Orchestration: Plan and execute a monthly calendar of promotional campaigns and SMS strategies.

Flow Optimization: Build and refine complex automated journeys (Welcome, Win-back, Fulfillment updates, etc.).

AI-Creative Direction: Use NanoBananaPro to analyze high-performing "Big Brand" models and translate those learnings into our creative strategy.

Weekly Reporting: Provide a detailed "State of the List" report every Monday, covering Revenue per Recipient, Churn Rate, and Flow performance.

Cost Management: Proactively audit our software (Klaviyo/Postscript/Attentive) to ensure we are not overpaying for inactive subscribers or inefficient SMS sends.



Technical Skills Required

Platform Mastery: Advanced experience with Klaviyo (or similar) and Shopify.

Copywriting: Ability to write high-converting, "on-brand" copy that speaks to women interested in beauty and sleep hygiene.

AI Savvy: Proficiency in using AI agents for segmentation, content creation, and A/B testing.

Analytical Mindset: You enjoy digging into data to find why a specific segment is churning and creating a plan to fix it.



How to Apply

Please send a message with the subject line "Beauty Sleep Ritual" and include:

A link to a portfolio or case study where you increased retention revenue for a 7-figure brand.

Your favorite "AI hack" for improving
 open rates.

A brief explanation of how you would convert 50,000 one-time buyers into subscribers.

title: Real Estate Research & Outreach VA — Commercial Real Estate (Ottawa, Canada focus)
description:

I'm a commercial real estate broker in Ottawa, Canada specializing in industrial properties. I'm looking for a detail-oriented VA to help me build targeted prospect lists, research business contacts, and load data into my CRM (Attio) to support outreach campaigns for active listings.

This is an ongoing role with consistent hours and clear, structured tasks. If you're reliable, organized, and good at research, this could be a long-term fit.



What You'll Be Doing



Researching Ottawa-based businesses that match specific buyer profiles (trades contractors, light manufacturers, distributors, etc.)

Finding decision-maker contact details (owner name,
, phone) using Google, LinkedIn, Canada411, and tools like Apollo or Hunter.io

Building and maintaining clean prospect lists in Attio CRM

Flagging contacts with relevant notes (e.g., "currently leasing in Kanata," "company recently expanded")

Updating contact records after outreach (call notes,
 status, follow-up dates)

Occasional help with
 template formatting and scheduling



You're a Great Fit If You:



Have done lead generation, prospect research, or list building before

Are comfortable using LinkedIn to find business owners and decision-makers

Have used a CRM tool (any platform — Attio, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

Deliver accurate, organized data — quality over quantity

Communicate proactively if something is unclear

Can work independently with minimal supervision



Tools We Use



Attio (CRM) — training provided

LinkedIn / LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Apollo.io or Hunter.io for
 finding

Google Sheets for list staging

Loom for async video instructions



Engagement Details



Start: ASAP

Hours: 5–20 hrs/week to start, with potential to grow

Format: Async, flexible hours — results matter more than schedule

Rate: Please include your hourly rate in your application



To Apply, Please:



Share 1–2 examples of list building or lead research work you've done before

Tell me what tools you've used to find business contact information

Complete this short test: Find 5 Ottawa-based HVAC or electrical contracting companies, with the owner's name, phone number, and
 address. Submit as a Google Sheet.

title: Real Estate Virtual Transaction Coordinator
description:

While this role is 100% remote, you will be an integral part of our Texas-based operations, requiring alignment with US Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.



Position Overview



The Real Estate Coordinator will support sales operations, transaction management, and client communications. Your goal is to ensure a "white-glove" experience for our clients from contract to close.



This position is ideal for an experienced Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA) or an administrative professional with 2–5 years of experience who is eager to grow within a high-volume US real estate environment.



Key Responsibilities



Transaction Coordination: Manage the "Contract to Close" process, ensuring all deadlines and compliance documents are met.



Stakeholder Communication: Liaise with clients, title companies, lenders, and vendors via
 and phone.

Marketing Support: Coordinate
 campaigns, social media posts, and digital flyers.



Scheduling: Manage calendars for inspections, appraisals, and closing appointments.



Qualifications



Experience: 2–5 years of experience in US Real Estate coordination (Texas market experience is a significant plus).



Technical Proficiency: Deep familiarity with MLS/HAR, DocuSign, ZipLogix, and CRM platforms.



Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English skills (near-native proficiency required for client interaction).



Schedule: Must be able to work Full-Time during US Central Standard Time (CST) hours.



Setup: Must have a reliable high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and a backup power solution (UPS/Generator).

Compensation & Benefits

Flexibility: 100% Remote work-from-home setup.



Culture: Supportive, fast-paced, and team-oriented environment.



Ideal Candidate



You are a "rockstar" administrator who understands that in real estate, time is of the essence. You don't just wait for tasks; you anticipate needs. You are looking for a stable, long-term partnership where your contributions to the team’s growth are valued and rewarded.



To Apply:



Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter (or a 1-minute intro video) outlining your experience with the Houston market or US real estate transactions.

title: eCommerce Video Editor
description:
Company: Ajile Co. – Performance Marketing Agency

Hours: 10–20 hrs/week (part-time to start, with a clear path to full-time)

Schedule: Flexible, but must overlap with US business hours for check-ins

Tools: CapCut (primary), familiarity with Adobe Premiere or After Effects is a plus



About Us

Ajile Co. is a performance marketing agency that helps eCommerce brands scale through Paid Ads,
, and Creative. We work with multiple brands across different verticals and move fast. Our creative team is the engine of everything we do — and we need another editor who can keep up.

The Role

We're looking for a sharp, reliable video editor who specializes in direct response ad creative — the kind of short-form, scroll-stopping content you see on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Meta ads.

Most of what you'll be editing is B-Roll based — taking raw footage, product clips, UGC, and stock and turning them into high-converting ads. This is not cinematic editing. This is performance creative — fast cuts, strong hooks, captions, and clear CTAs.

You'll start part-time (10–20 hours/week) and grow into a full-time role as you prove yourself and we continue to scale.

What You'll Do



Edit short-form video ads (15–60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and Instagram

Work primarily in CapCut to produce direct response creatives from B-Roll, product footage, and UGC clips

Follow creative briefs and implement feedback quickly (often same-day turnarounds)

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, sound effects, and music to maximize engagement

What We're Looking For



Proven experience editing short-form video ads for eCommerce brands or direct response

Strong understanding of TikTok/Reels pacing, formatting, and trends

Proficiency in CapCut (required); Adobe Premiere or After Effects is a bonus

Ability to take a creative brief and run with it — not just follow instructions, but bring ideas

Fast turnaround and comfort with iterative feedback loops

Reliable communication and availability during agreed-upon hours

Portfolio or samples of past ad/reel work (required with application)



How to Apply

How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



A brief intro about yourself and your editing experience

3–5 samples of short-form ad or reel content you've edited (links or files)

Your hourly rate expectation

Your current availability (hours per week and timezone)

Answer this question: "What makes a great hook in the first 3 seconds of a video ad?"

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (Cold Calling) | Good Base + High Commissions
description:
We are hiring a highly motivated outbound caller to contact plumbing companies in the United States and book appointments with business owners.



This is a high-activity sales role. You will be calling businesses, starting conversations, and booking short appointments. You are not responsible for closing deals — your job is simply to book qualified calls.



If you are confident on the phone and enjoy sales, this can become a very lucrative role with recurring commissions.



Schedule



• 5:00 AM – 11:00 AM Manila time

• Tuesday – Saturday

• Part-time (6 hours/day)



Optional overtime available:

• Sunday and Monday shifts may be offered for additional pay depending on call volume.



Compensation



• Base salary: $300/month

• Appointment bonus: $8–$10 per qualified booked call

• Commission: 10% recurring revenue for every client that signs



Because commission is recurring, successful dialers can build monthly income over time.



Example potential monthly earnings for a strong performer:



• Base salary: $300

• 40 booked appointments/month ? $320–$400 bonus

• 6 clients closed at $399/month ? ~$240 recurring commission



Example total monthly income:

$860 – $940+ per month, with commissions continuing each month clients stay active.



Top performers often exceed $1,000+/month as their recurring commissions grow.



What You Will Do



• Make outbound calls to U.S. plumbing companies

• Follow a proven call script

• Ask a few simple qualifying questions

• Book appointments on the calendar



You will not need to:



• Generate leads

• Research prospects

• Close deals



All leads, scripts, and training will be provided.



What We Are Looking For



• Confident English speaker

• Comfortable making 200–400 calls per day

• Positive, resilient attitude

• Strong work ethic

• Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience is a plus



Training



We provide:



• 2 days of paid training

• Mock call practice

• Live coaching during shifts

• Ongoing feedback to improve performance



Technology



We use a professional sales calling platform where all calls are recorded for coaching and improvement.



Important



This role involves high call volume and persistence. You should be comfortable hearing “no” many times and continuing to call with energy and professionalism.



Successful dialers in this role typically make 200–400 calls per day.



How to Apply



Please send:



A short voice recording introducing yourself



Your experience with cold calling or sales



We are looking to hire two dialers immediately, so apply soon if interested.

title: Executive Assistant - Biohack Yourself Media
description:
Position: Executive Assistant - Biohack Yourself Media



Your Core Mission



Your mission is to remove operational noise from the COO’s life.



Your mindset should be:



“How do I take this off his plate permanently?”



You will:



Manage and optimize scheduling strategically

Run operational follow-through after meetings

Track priorities across multiple projects

Communicate confidently with clients and partners

Organize ideas into systems and execution plans

Spot problems early and solve them independently

Create order out of fast-moving chaos

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Drive)

Calendly

Zoom

Monday.com

Asana

Slack / WhatsApp communication

Task and project management systems

Massive Advantage — AI + Automation Thinking



We strongly prefer someone who:



Uses AI tools daily to improve workflows

Understands ChatGPT and modern automation

Thinks in systems, not tasks

Looks for efficiency opportunities constantly

If you can make workflows faster and smarter — you will thrive here.



The Type of Person Who Wins Here



You:



Think like an owner

Move fast without being messy

Are proactive and solution-focused

Communicate clearly and confidently

Anticipate needs before they are spoken

Handle ambiguity without stress

Like responsibility and accountability

You enjoy being trusted.



You don’t need micromanagement.



The Type of Person Who Will Struggle Here



This role is NOT for someone who:



Needs step-by-step direction

Waits to be told what to do

Avoids decision-making

Gets overwhelmed by fast pace

Wants a simple admin role

What Success Looks Like (90 Days)



The COO’s schedule feels effortless

Meetings turn into execution automatically

Projects move faster because you’re driving organization

Problems are solved before they reach leadership

Leadership feels more focused and less operationally burdened

Growth Opportunity



This is a real growth position.



For the right person, this role can evolve into:



Executive Operations Lead

Strategic Operations Manager

Chief of Staff–type role

We reward people who create leverage and ownership.



Compensation



Competitive and based on experience, capability, and initiative.Growth opportunities tied to performance and long-term contribution.



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



Please include:



Resume or portfolio

A short message answering: “Why are you an operator, not just an assistant?”

Examples of systems, workflows, or processes you improved

AI tools you actively use in your work

Your timezone + availability

Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to grow into something bigger.



If you’re looking for a normal assistant position — this is not it.



If you want to become someone’s trusted right hand and help build something meaningful — we want to hear from you.

title: Freelance Video Editor
description:

title: Content Marketing Executive
description:
We are one of the UK’s leading investment education companies, helping everyday people take control of their finances through practical, real world investing education.



Our mission is simple. We make investing clear, accessible, and actionable. Through expert led training, live events, digital content, and a highly engaged community, we empower our members to build long term wealth with confidence, without the jargon or overwhelm that often comes with investing.



Behind the scenes, our marketing team plays a vital role in delivering this mission. We ensure our message is clear, consistent, and impactful across every channel. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Marketing Executive who will take ownership of our social media presence while also supporting the operational and administrative needs of the wider marketing department.



What would I be doing?



Working for Investment Mastery, you will play a central role in both managing our social media strategy and supporting the day to day organisation of the marketing department.



This is not just a coordination role. You will act as our Social Media Manager, owning the strategy, planning, creation, distribution, and performance of content across all social platforms. You will be responsible for generating content ideas, collaborating with the creative team to bring them to life, distributing the content effectively, and reporting on performance against clearly defined KPIs.



Alongside this, you will also provide marketing administrative support, ensuring the department runs efficiently and remains organised, aligned, and on track.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both creative ownership and structured execution — someone who can think strategically about content while also ensuring the department operates smoothly behind the scenes.



You will work closely with the Marketing Manager, creative team, and wider marketing department, while also developing your own investing knowledge through our internal training programmes.



What would my day to day look like?



In short, you will manage and grow our social media presence while supporting the operational effectiveness of the marketing department.



More specifically, you will:



Social Media Ownership & Strategy



• Take full ownership of our social media channels, including
, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, and future platforms as we expand

• Develop and lead the social media content strategy aligned with company objectives

• Generate content ideas designed to educate, engage, and convert our audience

• Plan content calendars and ensure consistent posting across all platforms

• Work closely with the creative team to brief, build, refine, and optimise content

• Provide feedback on creative assets to ensure messaging, brand consistency, and performance optimisation

• Distribute content effectively across platforms, tailoring format and messaging to each channel

• Monitor performance and report on key metrics and KPIs (engagement, growth, leads, conversions, etc.)

• Analyse data and continuously refine strategy based on insights

• Be accountable for the growth, engagement, and performance of all social channels



You will have clear KPIs and measurable targets for social media performance and will be expected to take ownership of achieving them.



Marketing Coordination & Admin Support



• Attend marketing meetings, take structured notes, and document decisions and action points

• Help assign and track tasks across the marketing team to ensure deadlines are met

• Maintain marketing plans, calendars, and internal documentation

• Support campaign coordination by managing timelines, assets, and approvals

• Act as a key point of organisation between content, paid, CRM, and creative functions

• Identify inefficiencies or bottlenecks and suggest process improvements

• Ensure messaging and branding remain consistent across all activity

• Carry out marketing administrative tasks to ensure the department has the operational support it needs

• Support ad hoc initiatives that help the team execute effectively



You will be both the organisational backbone of the department and the driving force behind our social media presence.



The Ideal Candidate



• Highly organised and proactive, with a natural ability to take ownership

• Confident managing and growing multiple social media platforms

• Experienced in developing content ideas and turning strategy into execution

• Comfortable working with creative teams and providing clear briefs and feedback

• Data driven, with experience reporting on KPIs and improving performance

• Strong understanding of organic marketing and content led growth

• Comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast paced environment

• Clear and confident communicator with strong attention to detail

• Enjoys both creative thinking and operational structure

• Curious about investing and personal finance (prior knowledge is helpful but not essential)

title: Final Cut Pro Editor for VO-Heavy YouTube (20–25 min) -- Paid Test
description:
I’m looking for a Final Cut Pro editor to help me edit 1 long-form YouTube video per month. My videos are VO-heavy and story-driven. This is not flashy montage editing. I care most about pacing, clarity, tension, and clean audio.



What you’ll do (initial scope)

- Build a VO-first / radio cut (story structure and pacing)

- Pull selects and assemble scenes cleanly

- Basic audio cleanup/leveling (dialogue clarity)

- Light sound design + music placeholders (only if you’re strong here)

- Deliver a clean FCP library and a reference export



Software / Requirements

- Final Cut Pro required (please don’t apply if you only use Premiere/Resolve)

- Comfortable working with proxy media and delivering a relinkable project

- Strong English communication for notes/revisions

- Experience with longform YouTube storytelling (please share examples)



Deliverables

- .fcpbundle library with organized Events/timelines

- Reference export (H.264 is fine)



Workflow

I will provide a proxy package. You cut with proxies; I relink to originals for finishing/export.



Turnaround

Target: first cut within 5–7 days of receiving the proxy package (we can adjust after the test).



Paid Test (required)

I will pay for a short test edit before committing long-term. I will pay for your time on this test, but not the full job amount.

Test: 3–5 minutes from provided footage (VO-first story cut).

Deliver: FCP library + reference export + a short note explaining your story choices.



Budget

Please propose:

1. Your fixed price for the paid test, and

2. Your flat rate for a 20–25 minute VO-heavy longform edit (1 video/month), and optionally

3. Add-on pricing for 2–4 shorts pulled from the longform (not required).



To apply

Start your proposal with: “FCP YOUTUBE” and include:

- Relevant longform examples

- Your turnaround estimate for a 20–25 min video

- Your proposed pricing (test + monthly video)

title: Part-Time Long-Term Social Media Assistant (Travel Blog)
description:
Hi! I’m a travel blogger looking for a reliable, long-term Filipino team member to help me grow my brand on Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest, and my blog.



I value loyalty, clear communication, and long-term working relationships. I’m not looking for someone short-term, I’m looking for someone who wants stable work and to grow together over time.



Hours & Salary

Starting Phase:

- 10 hrs/week (can be 2hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible with how you want to spread your hours) 

- $120/month



After Training & Once Systems Are Smooth:

- 15 hrs/week (can be 3hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible with how you want to spread your hours) 

- $200/month



If we're a fantastic fit: 

- 20 hrs/week (can be 4hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible)

- $320/month 



Salary increases as responsibilities grow and performance improves. I reward consistency and reliability.



Main Responsibilities

 Video Editing (CapCut Pro – provided)

- Edit Instagram Reels using my voiceovers and footage

- Edit YouTube videos (mostly short-form)

- Add captions + music + fast cuts at different moments of the video

- Make content engaging and clean (I don't need fancy transitions or special effects)



 Instagram Support

- Create simple static posts (no heavy design, templates provided)

- Write captions

- Help improve engagement

- Understand what works for travel/blogger accounts



 Pinterest Management

- Upload and optimize video pins

- Create simple static pins

- Write SEO-friendly titles & descriptions (I don't mind you using ChatGPT, but please proof read everything!) 

- Help drive traffic to the blog



(Experience with Pinterest marketing for bloggers is a big plus.)



 Blog Support (Occasional)

- Add/update affiliate links

- Update older blog posts

- Improve key sections



 Growth Support (Bonus)

- Experience growing Instagram, Pinterest, or YouTube

- Experience with sponsorship outreach is a plus



I’m Looking For Someone Who:

- Is reliable and meets deadlines

- Communicates clearly

- Takes initiative (doesn’t wait to be told every small step)

- Has experience with CapCut

- Understands social media trends

- Wants stable, long-term income

- Is honest and professional



If you have worked with bloggers before — that is a strong advantage.

Also if you have any knowledge of Las Vegas and you're interested in learning more about the city by working on my blog with me, that's also a bonus because I talk about the destination a lot! 



 SHORT SKILLS TEST (IMPORTANT)

To make sure applicants carefully read this post, please include the word:

“SUNSET”

at the top of your application.



Then please share 1–2 sample video edits (Google Drive or Loom link), and examples of client accounts you've helped grow. 



Applications without the keyword will not be reviewed.



4 Personality Filter Question (Very Important)



Imagine I give you a task and the instructions are not 100% clear. What would you do?

A) Wait for clearer instructions before starting

 B) Do your best guess and submit it

 C) Ask clarifying questions first, then proceed

 D) Something else 

Also briefly describe your working style in 3 words.



30-Day Trial Plan

To make sure this is a good fit for both of us, we’ll follow this structure:



Week 1: Training & Systems

Learn my brand voice

Learn my editing style

Edit 3–5 short-form videos

Upload 5–10 Pinterest pins

Light blog update task



Goal: Understand workflow and communication.



Week 2: Independent Execution

Edit 5–8 videos

Create 10–15 Pinterest pins

Draft captions independently

Suggest 2 content improvement ideas



Goal: Show initiative and attention to detail.



Week 3: Optimization

Improve editing speed

Suggest 1 Pinterest growth idea

Assist with updating 3 blog posts

Begin tracking simple metrics (views, saves, clicks)



Goal: Start thinking strategically.



Week 4: Review & Expansion Plan

Performance review

Discuss increasing hours to 5/day

Clarify long-term role growth





I treat my team with respect and clear expectations. If you are hardworking and loyal, I will take care of you long-term.

I’m excited to find the right person to grow this brand together!

title: Google AdWords Contractor
description:
About the Role



As a Google AdWords Contractor, you’ll support the setup, execution, and reporting of campaigns on Google AdWords. You’ll work closely with the team to ensure campaigns are launched on time, tracking is accurate, and performance data is clearly reported.



This role is ideal for someone detail-oriented who enjoys working behind the scenes—organizing campaigns, maintaining structure, and ensuring clean reporting.



We primarily work with B2B companies, so having B2B / SaaS based experience is a huge plus for this role. 



What You’ll Do



- Assist in setting up campaigns across Google Ads.



- Help ensure all UTMs, pixels, and conversion tracking are properly implemented and tested before campaigns go live.



- Build and maintain weekly and monthly performance reports across Google Ads, and analytics tools like Google Analytics, Looker Studio, and HubSpot.



- Update and track budgets and pacing within spreadsheets or dashboards to ensure campaigns stay aligned with plan.



- Collect and organize creative assets, ad copy, and targeting parameters for campaign launches.



- Conduct data analysis, such as identifying which ads are receiving the most engagement or clicks.



- Document campaign changes, performance trends, and learnings in shared project management tools.



Who You Are



- 2+ years of experience assisting with Google Ads campaigns.



- Comfortable working with tracking tools (Google Tag Manager, HubSpot tracking, UTMs).



- Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for reporting and data organization.



- Highly organized with a strong attention to detail and accuracy.



- Able to communicate clearly with internal teams and follow structured workflows.



- Curious about digital advertising and analytics, and eager to learn more about campaign management.

title: Lead Generation Specialist – Web Design Agencies (Remote, Part-Time)
description:

Quill Quest Agency is hiring a Lead Generation Specialist to research and collect qualified web design agencies in the United States.



Your role is to identify legitimate, established web design agencies and gather accurate contact information for outreach.



This is a research-focused position. Outreach and
 sending are handled internally.

• Collect and organize the following in Google Sheets:



Agency Name



Website



Owner/Founder Name



Verified
 Address



City/State



Notes (team size, niche, positioning, etc.)

• Deliver consistent daily output

• Maintain high data accuracy



 Lead Qualification Standards



A qualified agency must:



• Be U.S.-based

Compensation

title: Reddit Marketing Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a Reddit Marketing Assistant to help grow awareness for an AI SaaS product through thoughtful, strategic participation across Reddit.



This role is not* about spamming links or posting obvious promotions. The focus is on creating indirect promotional content and relevant discussion threads, identifying relevant communities, joining conversations naturally, and helping position the product in a way that feels authentic and valuable to each subreddit.



What you’ll do



-Find relevant subreddits and discussions where our product or expertise is a natural fit

-Create and publish indirect promotional posts that feel organic to the community

-Engage in comments and discussions in a natural, helpful way

-Adapt posting style based on subreddit culture and rules

-Work from strategies, angles, and post concepts provided by the employer

-Suggest new Reddit growth ideas based on what is performing well

-Track post performance, engagement, and learnings



What we’re looking for



-Strong understanding of Reddit culture, tone, and etiquette

-Ability to write in a natural, non-corporate, non-salesy style

-Experience promoting products or brands through community-led content is a plus

-Good judgment around what works on Reddit and what gets ignored or downvoted

-Organized, proactive, and able to execute consistently



Ideal candidate

You understand the difference between promotion and participation. You know how to make a post feel native to a subreddit, how to start conversations, and how to build interest without making it feel forced.



Compensation

Open to hourly, part-time, or project-based depending on experience.



To apply, send:



- A short intro

- Any past experience with Reddit marketing, growth, or community engagement

- 2–3 examples of posts or campaigns you’ve with

title: WordPress Website Designer & Builder (Design-Focused)
description:
WordPress Website Designer & Builder (Design-Focused)

Remote | Full-Time or Part-Time



About the Role

We are looking for a WordPress Website Designer & Builder who is highly competent in design and implementation, with less emphasis on strategy or project management.



This role is ideal for someone who loves designing clean, modern websites in Figma and then building them accurately in WordPress. You will work from clear briefs, structures, and direction, focusing on producing high-quality design and builds rather than managing the full website strategy.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Website Design (Figma-First)

Designing website pages and layouts in Figma based on provided briefs and structures

Creating modern, conversion-aware UI/UX with strong visual hierarchy

Maintaining consistent spacing, typography, and component use

Applying brand guidelines accurately across designs



WordPress Build & Implementation

Building approved designs in WordPress using Zion Builder and Bricks Builder

Ensuring designs are translated accurately from Figma to live sites

Implementing responsive behaviour across desktop, tablet, and mobile

Keeping builds clean, lightweight, and well-structured



Performance Awareness

Following basic CRO and UX best practices when designing and building

Implementing on-page SEO fundamentals as instructed

Ensuring websites are fast, responsive, and technically sound



This Role Is Not a Fit If

You only design or only build

You rely on Elementor or Divi only

You prefer heavy strategy or client-facing project management

You are uncomfortable working from briefs and direction



This Role Is a Fit If

You are strong in Figma-based website design

You can confidently build what you design in WordPress

You care about clean execution and visual quality

You work well from clear instructions and structures

You want to focus on design and build, not project management



Required Skills & Experience

Advanced Figma skills for website design

Strong WordPress build experience

Proven experience with Zion Builder and Bricks Builder

Understanding of responsive design and UX fundamentals

Familiarity with basic CRO and on-page SEO principles

Experience designing and building service-based or lead-generation websites

(Elementor- or Divi-only designers will not be considered.)



Availability & Work Setup

Remote role

Full-time or part-time depending on fit

Must be available for collaboration during AWST business hours

Long-term role for the right person



How to Apply

Apply via OnlineJobs.ph.

Please include:

1. A portfolio of websites you designed and built

2. Live links to websites you personally worked on

3. A short summary of your experience with Figma, Zion Builder, and Bricks Builder



Applications without real examples of both design and build work will not be considered.

title: Video Producer – Short Form Content
description:
About 37 Projects

We are the #1 Video Podcast Marketing Service for Health & Performance Brands.

We help top experts, nutritionists, doctors, and wellness professionals grow their YouTube presence with engaging, high-quality content.



About the Role

37 Projects produces large volumes of YouTube Shorts, clips, and podcast content for leading voices in health, wellness, and performance.

We already have video editors, content managers, and quality checkers.

However, we are looking for someone who can protect the creative quality of the content before it is delivered to the client.

This role sits between the editors and final approval.

Your job is to ensure the videos are visually strong, engaging, and aligned with brand style before they are finalized.



What You Will Do

Review completed videos and evaluate:

• Hook strength in the first seconds

• Visual emphasis of key 
nts

• Animation quality and motion graphics

• Caption readability and pacing

• Visual storytelling clarity

• Overall engagement of the Short



If a video is weak or incomplete, you provide clear feedback to the editor for improvement.

Example feedback:

Instead of: “Animation is weak.”

You might say: “This sentence should have a full-screen text emphasis instead of a small caption highlight.”



Your Responsibilities

• Review Shorts, clips, and trailers before final approval

• Ensure animations and captions follow brand guidelines

• Improve visual storytelling when needed

• Provide clear feedback to editors in 
 or similar tools

• Help maintain consistent creative standards across clients



You Are a Good Fit If You

• Have strong instincts for short-form storytelling

• Can immediately see when a video feels weak or slow

• Understand pacing, emphasis, and viewer attention

• Have experience reviewing or directing video edits

• Are comfortable giving feedback to editors



Important

This role is not primarily editing videos.



Your main responsibility is creative review and feedback.



Ideal Background

• Video editor with strong storytelling instincts

• YouTube producer

• Short-form content specialist

• Motion graphics editor with creative direction experience



Tools We Use

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• 

• Notion

• Slack





Typical workload:

• Reviewing multiple Shorts and clips per day

• Providing feedback to editors



How to Apply

title: Amazon Data Analyst - Day Shift, Remote (PH)
description:
About RocketAMS

RocketAMS is a thriving, fully remote Amazon eCommerce agency based in Australia, founded by ex-Amazon Australia employees with over $100 million in collective sales experience. We're a startup on the rise, aiming to redefine success on Amazon for our clients. Join a dynamic team that values expertise, collaboration, and growth.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Amazon Data Analyst to support internal teams by delivering accurate, timely, and actionable insights from Amazon and eCommerce data. This is a behind-the-scenes, non-client-facing role, focused on data analysis, reporting, and automation to enable informed decision-making across the business.



Responsibilities:

Data Analysis:

Collect, process, and analyze Amazon sales data, advertising data, and relevant marketplace metrics.  

Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards and reports related to sales performance, inventory levels, and advertising efficiency.  

Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in datasets to support internal planning and strategy.  Use SQL and/or Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) to query, analyze, and validate large datasets.  Automate recurring reports and data workflows using Google Sheets, advanced formulas, or BI tools. 



Internal Team Support:

Work closely with Brand Managers, Account Specialists, and PPC teams to support strategy and execution through data insights.  

Provide clear, structured analysis to help internal teams optimize listings, advertising performance, and operational planning.  

Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across internal reports and dashboards.



Requirements

2+ years of data analytics experience 

Hands-on experience with Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) or SQL 

Experience with Amazon, advertising, or eCommerce data

Strong analytical skills with advanced Google Sheets / Excel capability

Experience with reporting, forecasting, and performance analysis

High-detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage tasks independently



Benefits

Paid Time Off

Work From Home

Training & Development

Private Health Insurance After 12 Months

Day Shift - 7am to 4pm PH Time

s when necessary

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven Google Ads Specialist to join our team at Shoutout Digital, a marketing agency based in Australia working mostly with dental and healthcare clients. This is a long-term role where you’ll be managing Google Ads campaigns across multiple client accounts, from setup to optimisation and reporting.



If you’re analytical, proactive with strategy, and confident working independently while following clear SOPs and processes, this could be a great fit for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



You’ll take the lead in managing Google Ads campaigns across multiple client accounts, from setup to optimisation. You won’t be doing this alone. We have SOPs in place, and you’ll work closely with our internal team for support with creatives, landing pages, and tracking setup.



• Campaign Setup

Plan, build, and launch campaigns based on client goals such as new patient bookings or emergency appointments. Our team will support you with tracking, assets, and landing page coordination.



• Ongoing Optimisation

Monitor performance, adjust budgets, update keywords, manage bidding strategies, and keep an eye on important metrics such as impression share and ROAS.



• Performance Reviews

Review campaign performance weekly and monthly to guide strategy and make sure strong campaigns continue to scale.



• Search and Competitor Insights

Review search terms regularly, check auction insights, and use Performance Max reports to guide keyword and asset decisions.



• Testing and Improvements

Test different ad copy, targeting options, and landing page variations. Scale what works and refine or remove what doesn’t.



• Quarterly Strategy Reviews

Every few months you’ll review the bigger picture. This includes campaign structure, targeting, devices, audiences, and overall direction to keep campaigns performing well.



You’ll also help maintain a healthy optimisation score, keep quality score on track, and flag anything unusual such as tracking issues or sudden performance drops.





What Success Looks Like in This Role



In this role, success is measured by how well campaigns perform and improve over time. We’re looking for someone who takes ownership of results and consistently looks for ways to make campaigns stronger.



Some of the key things we look for include:



• Maintaining strong campaign structure and optimisation practices

• Improving cost per conversion over time

• Identifying opportunities to scale campaigns that are performing well

• Catching issues early such as tracking problems or sudden performance drops

• Providing clear insights during performance reviews



You don’t need to chase vanity metrics. What matters most is helping our clients generate consistent, high-quality patient bookings.





Experience That Would Be Great to Have



• Experience managing campaigns for service-based businesses

• Familiarity with local lead generation campaigns (clinics, healthcare, etc.)

• Experience handling multiple client accounts at once

• Comfortable reviewing landing pages and suggesting improvements

• Strong understanding of search intent and keyword strategy



Bonus if you have experience working with healthcare or dental clients, but this is not required.





Tools You’ll Use



• Google Ads

• GA4

• GTM

• GoHighLevel

• Notion for task tracking (training will be provided)

• 
 for internal communication



Work Hours 



 • Starting at 20-30 hours per week

 • Schedule is flexible (You don’t need to work straight shifts)

 • Our company’s business hours are 10 AM to 5 PM Philippine time. This is a day shift role with no night work required.





How to Apply



If you’re interested, please apply here:





We’re excited to meet someone who’s just as committed to performance and growth as we are!

title: Trailer Architect / Podcast Story Producer Application
description:
About 37 Projects



37 Projects is a YouTube-first video podcast marketing agency working with health, wellness, and performance brands. We help experts, doctors, and founders turn long-form conversations into high-retention YouTube videos that educate, build trust, and grow audiences.



We are not a generic content agency. Our work is research-driven, audience-aware, and optimized for YouTube discovery and retention.



About the Role

37 Projects produces podcast content for health experts, doctors, researchers, and performance brands. From every podcast episode we create multiple assets: full episodes, clips, Shorts, and high-impact trailers.



The trailer is one of the most important pieces of content we produce. It needs to capture the emotional tension, ideas, and story of the episode in a short, powerful format.



We are looking for someone who can design the architecture of these trailers.

This role is not about editing. It is about story judgment.

You will watch the full podcast episode and determine which 
nts belong in the trailer and in what order to create the strongest narrative.

Video editors will then execute the edit based on your blueprint.



What You Will Do

• Watch full podcast episodes (1–2 hours)

• Identify the most powerful, emotional, or thought-provoking 
nts

• Select 15–20 candidate clips for the trailer

• Build the story structure of the trailer

• Arrange the clips in a way that creates curiosity, tension, and payoff

• Deliver a clear timestamp blueprint for editors



Example deliverable:



TRAILER STRUCTURE

0:00 Hook

12:14 – Key provocative idea

0:07 Curiosity 
nt

05:58 – Unexpected question

0:16 Emotional insight

20:56 – Personal reflection

0:28 Thought-provoking idea

17:33 – Key concept

0:38 Closing line



Editors then produce the final trailer using this structure.



You Are a Good Fit If You

• Have a strong editorial eye for storytelling

• Understand pacing, emotional beats, and narrative tension

• Can identify 
nts that make viewers curious

• Are comfortable watching long-form conversations and extracting the best parts

• Have experience with YouTube, documentaries, podcast editing, journalism, or narrative storytelling



This Role Is NOT

? Video editing

? Motion graphics design

? Thumbnail creation

This role is about content judgment and storytelling architecture.



Nice to Have

• Experience editing podcast content

• Experience producing YouTube content

• Experience with documentary storytelling

• Familiarity with YouTube audience psychology



Work Setup

Remote work with flexible hours.



Typical workload:

• 16-24 podcast episodes per month

• Each episode requires 1 trailer blueprint



How to Apply

title: Writing fanfiction/webnovels
description:
what I'm looking for is someone capable and fluent in english and excels at writing stories, more specifically, writing fanfiction/webnovels about anime like Naruto, Bleach, Fairy Tail, Solo Leveling, Dragon Ball Super, Classroom of the elite, Fate/Stay night, etc... the person shouldn't just be good in writing in english, but should excel at writing stories that make readers gasp in awe, and the writer I'm looking for should also be familiar with the animes mentioned and preferably more. 



Someone experinced in writing fanfiction is what I'm looking for, someone who can write multiple stories a month, we're looking at least six-seven chapters, preferably around 15+ but the minimum is 6+ with each chapter being around
words. but even if you can do that,I will not accept anyone using A.I like chatgpt to help them with writing, what I want is honest natural talent. so If I detect any A.I, then there's no collaboration.



If you are fluent with english, familiar with anime like the ones mentioned, are very good in writing stories, can write at least 6 or 7 chapters a month (with each chapter being around
words) and you're a natural (meaning without the help of A.I), I'd love to have you on board. 



The pay is based on number of chapters written, each chapter having a worth of $25, if you write twenty chapters a month, you'll get a $500 in total. if you write six chapters a month, then it would $150, etc...



I look forward to having you on board.

title: Content Manager/Content Curator – Video Podcast Remote
description:
Company Overview:

We are 37 Projects, a fast-growing YouTube Video Marketing Agency that helps health and wellness brands maximize their reach through high-quality video content, Shorts, and podcast marketing. We’re looking for a YouTube & Podcast Content Manager who can analyze long-form podcasts, craft compelling YouTube Shorts & Clips, and ensure all content aligns with the client’s brand voice and audience engagement strategies.



I. Content Manager Responsibilities



1. Content Consumption



- Watch 1–2 hour video podcasts on health, fitness, and nutrition topics.

- Develop a deep understanding of each podcast’s themes and key messages to inform content creation.



2. Clip & Short Identification (NOT Editing)



- Identify segments ideal for YouTube Clips and YouTube Shorts.

- Select the best 
nts for intros that build a compelling storytelling narrative.



3. Content Strategy & Quality Assurance



- Ensure all clips, shorts, and intros align with the client’s brand voice and content strategy.

- Perform content-only quality checks on first rough-cut videos (focus on flow, clarity, and messaging—not captions, graphics, or motion design).



4. Intros & Trailers



- Select punchy and engaging 
nts from the podcast to be used in the trailer (approx. 70–80 seconds).

- Provide editors with timestamps and key sentences to include, ensuring the trailer highlights the right topics or subtopics.

- Collaborate with the Project Manager and Video Editor to align on creative direction and client expectations.



Example: Similar to Steven Bartlett’s Diary of a CEO trailers, which combine intro narration with short, high-impact clips.



II. Scope of Work



- Manage content across five clients.

- Watch and process around 15–16 podcasts per month (on average, 3–4 per client).

- Produce selections for around 8 trailers per month (?2 per week, one per client).

- Deliverables include weekly clips, shorts, and trailers, ensuring consistency across all client channels.

- Collaborate closely with Project Managers and Video Editors to maintain smooth production flow and client satisfaction.



III Requirements:



1. Availability & Commitment:

- Full-time remote position - no other job commitments to ensure focus.

- Must have a high-performance laptop/computer and stable internet.



2. Experience & Education:

- Proven experience in video editing or podcast production (video/audio).

- Graduates in Communication, Multimedia, or Video Production are highly preferred.

- Experience in YouTube content creation (Shorts, Clips, long-form podcasts) - a bonus



3. Skills & Tools:

- SEO writing experience is a plus.

- Strong organizational and time management skills to handle multiple projects.

- Proficiency in:

   + Slack

   + Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

   + Notion

   + AI writing tools (ChatGPT, Claude)

   + YouTube SEO tools (VidIQ, SEMrush) – a bonus



4. Strong storytelling ability to identify and structure the most compelling 
nts in videos.



5. Preferred Bonus Skills:

- Knowledge of health, fitness, and nutrition topics (to select key 
nts effectively).

- Creative mindset with the ability to suggest innovative content formats & strategies.



???? How to Apply

???? Fill out this form to apply:
