title: Amazon PPC Specialist - Remote - Dayshift - Fulltime (PH)
description:
IMPORTANT: We are accepting applications only through this link: 



About RocketAMS



RocketAMS is a thriving, fully remote Amazon eCommerce agency based in Australia, founded by ex-Amazon Australia employees with over $100 million in collective sales experience. We're a startup on the rise, aiming to redefine success on Amazon for our clients. Join a dynamic team that values expertise, collaboration, and growth.



About the Role



We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Amazon PPC Specialist to join our team. This fully remote, dayshift position is ideal for someone with a strong grasp of Amazon advertising who can confidently manage multiple accounts, optimize campaign performance, and drive client success through strategic execution and collaboration.



This role begins as an hourly contract with strong potential to become full-time, offering flexibility upfront and a clear path to long-term growth and meaningful impact within a supportive, fast-growing team.



If you have a sharp analytical mindset, a passion for performance marketing, and a talent for fine-tuning paid campaigns to accelerate growth, we’d love to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities



Create and manage Sponsored Product and Display campaigns using internal templates. Understand various ad types and align campaigns with specific performance goals.

Monitor campaign performance metrics (ACoS, impressions, etc.), make manual bid and budget adjustments, and recommend strategies such as contextual targeting to improve results.

Confidently manage multiple accounts. Support client-facing teams by preparing reports, responding to basic requests via the Brand Manager, and contributing to the execution of client marketing plans.

Track and interpret key performance indicators including ACoS, ROAS, CTR, and CVR. Understand and navigate campaign dashboards to provide actionable insights.

Understand the purpose of A/B testing, monitor ongoing tests, run experiments, and provide clear reporting on test outcomes.

Automate reporting processes and bid adjustments. Evaluate and implement new tools to enhance efficiency and share automation best practices with the team.

Conduct basic keyword research, utilize suggested terms, and apply negative keyword strategies to refine targeting.

Communicate effectively and consistently deliver high-quality work. Contribute to a positive team environment by actively participating in meetings, team chats, and initiatives.



What You’ll Bring

Strong understanding of Amazon PPC advertising, campaign objectives, and optimization techniques

Experience working with performance metrics and advertising dashboards

Ability to manage multiple accounts efficiently and meet performance targets

Interest in industry trends and a willingness to learn from internal training

Collaborative mindset and a proactive approach to problem-solving



Work Schedule:

7am - 4pm PH Time

Monday to Friday

Australian Public Holidays



Benefits:

Comprehensive remote work flexibility.

Professional development opportunities within a leading Amazon management agency.

Engagement in high-impact projects that drive significant client success.

Day-shift (10am start Sydney time)



Why Join Us?

Work with ex-Amazonians and industry experts.

Fast-growing agency with opportunities to lead and grow.

Flexible, remote-friendly work environment.



We are accepting applications only through this link: 



If you’re ready to take your Amazon PPC expertise to the next level, apply now!



Job Types: Full-time



Benefits:

Paid Time Off

Work From Home

Training & Development

Private Health Insurance After 12 Months

Day Shift - 7am to 4pm PH Time



Experience:

Must have experience with Amazon Ads: 1 year (Preferred)

Experience with Retail Media (Walmart, and TikTok Ads), Retail Media Ads, or Social Ads is a plus.



Work Location: Remote

title: Virtual Assistant – Australian Accounting Assistant (Xero / AU Client Experience)
description:
Virtual Assistant – Australian Accounting Assistant (Xero / AU Client Experience)



Overview

We are looking for a Virtual Assistant with experience supporting an Australian accounting firm.



This role is ideal for someone who has previously worked as an Accounting Assistant, Bookkeeper, or Junior Accountant for Australian clients and is familiar with Australian tax processes and accounting systems.



You will assist our Senior Accountant with day-to-day tax and accounting tasks for Australian clients.



This is a full-time remote role with long-term stability for the right candidate.





Key Responsibilities



You will assist with:

• Preparing workpapers for Individual, Company, Trust, and Partnership tax returns

• Supporting BAS and IAS preparation

• Data entry and bookkeeping in Xero

• Preparing financial statements and reconciliations

• Assisting with Div 7A loan schedules (basic support)

• Assisting with Franking Account tracking

• Supporting the accountant with tax planning preparation

• Maintaining client files and accounting records

• Communicating with the accounting team when required



Accounting assistants often help maintain financial records, prepare statements, and ensure compliance with tax rules.



Required Experience



Please apply only if you meet the following:

• 2+ years experience working with an Australian accounting firm or client

• Experience using Xero (required)

• Familiarity with BAS / GST / Australian tax processes

• Experience preparing tax return workpapers

• Strong attention to detail

• Excellent written English



Bonus Skills (Not Required but Preferred)

• Experience with Xero Practice Manager (XPM)

• Knowledge of Division 7A (Div7A)

• Understanding of Franking Credits

• Experience assisting with tax planning



Work Setup

• Remote / Work From Home

• Full-time position

• Long-term client

• Work hours aligned with Australian business hours





How to Apply



To apply for this position, please complete the Google Form below. (remove spaces)

Applications submitted through OnlineJobs messages will not be reviewed.

Application Form: https :// forms. gle/ 7qdbDSamSZniGJGS6



Please make sure to include:

• Your updated resume

• Summary of your experience working with Australian accounting clients

• Your Xero experience

• Internet speed test screenshot



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Customer Support Lead (E-commerce)
description:
About the Role:

We’re seeking a proactive, experienced Customer Support Lead to oversee our support team and deliver exceptional customer experiences. In this role, you will lead a team of customer support representatives, optimize daily operations, and implement strategies that continuously improve service quality. Your leadership will directly impact customer satisfaction, team performance, and overall company success.



What We Offer:

- Starting salary: $650 USD/month

- Full-time, 40 hours/week, fully remote

- Flexible working hours

- Quarterly performance-based bonuses

- 20 days paid time off and 10 sick days





Key Responsibilities:

Inbox & Brand Ownership

- Take complete ownership of the customer support inbox for one assigned brand, ensuring timely, accurate, and professional responses.

- Be accountable for overall inbox health, response times, customer satisfaction, and issue resolution.

Handle complex or escalated customer issues directly when required.



Team Management & Oversight

- Manage and support the customer support team, overseeing daily performance, workloads, and response quality, including responsibilities for other brand.

- Provide guidance, feedback, and ongoing coaching to maintain consistent service standards.

- Support onboarding and training of new tea
mbers.



Operations & Process Management

- Manage daily support operations using Freshdesk while tracking tasks, performance, and workflows in ClickUp.

- Identify operational gaps and implement process improvements to increase efficiency and customer satisfaction.

- Escalate risks, trends, or recurring issues to leadership with clear recommendations.

- Work directly within Shopify to review orders, refunds, customer data, and disputes.

- Ensure accurate documentation and adherence to internal processes across all systems.



Requirements:

- 2+ years of experience leading or managing a customer support team, preferably in an e-commerce environment.

- Hands-on experience with Shopify to ensure seamless customer experiences.

- Proficiency with CRMs such as ClickUp (or similar platforms) to streamline workflows and team operations.

- Experience with helpdesk tools like Freshdesk, or equivalent.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to interact effectively across teams.

- A demonstrated ability to coach, mentor, and develop support tea
mbers to reach their full potential.

- The ability to prioritize multiple initiatives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

- Excellent problem-solving skills and the composure to handle challenges under pressure.

title: Bid Solicitor
description:
Outcomes (what success looks like)

*Coverage: ? 95% of trade packages receive 3+ qualified bids (stretch: 4+).

*On-time bids: ? 90% of bids received by the deadline.

*Quality: 100% of bids aligned to standardized scope sheets; ? 5% post-award scope gaps.

*Prequal health: ? 90% of active bidders current on COI, W-9, safety EMR, bonding, capacity.

*Speed: ITB-to-bid cycle ? 10 business days (typical interiors) / ? 15 (ground-up).

*Diversity & reach: Maintain an active, rated bench of 8–12 qualified subs per key trade; track W/MBE participation where applicable.

*Partner experience: ? 8/10 trade partner satisfaction (post-bid quick pulse).





Responsibilities



Market & bench building

*Build and continuously expand TriArc’s qualified trade partner database by trade, geography, capacity, and performance.

*Run ongoing prequalification (financials, safety, workload, bonding) in coordination with Accounting.



Bid strategy & scheduling

*Publish the rolling Bid Calendar; align milestones with Estimators/PMs and owners/architects.

*Break down drawings/specs into clear trade packages; assign scope sheets and alternates.



ITB execution

*Prepare Invitation to Bid packages (drawings, specs, addenda, bid forms, alternates, due dates, delivery method).

*Post to BuildingConnected; segment targeted lists; personalize top-tier outreach.



Relentless follow-up

*3-touch cadence (Day 1
 + Day 3 call/text + Day 5 confirmation) and pre-deadline “nudge” to secure commitments.

*Track interest/no-bid reasons; backfill gaps early; escalate risk areas to Estimating.



Bid intake & leveling

*Receive bids, confirm inclusions/exclusions, and level against scope sheets; flag outliers and VE options.

*Package a clean Bid Leveling Matrix for Estimators/PMs with award recommendation.



Data & feedback loops

*Score and rate trade partner performance post-award (price accuracy, quality, safety, schedule).

*Run post-bid debriefs; capture lessons learned to refine future ITBs.



Brand & relationship

*Be TriArc’s front door for subs: fast answers, fair process, respectful communication, and values-based partnership.





Required Traits & Skills

*Excellent Communication Skills

*Hunter mentality: proactive, persistent, upbeat on the phone; comfortable making 30–50 quality contacts/day in peak cycles.

*Construction fluency: understands typical scopes (CSI divisions), alternates, addenda, and gaps that derail bids.

*Process discipline: lives in checklists, documents everything.

*Communication: crisp writing, professional phone presence, tact with hard-bid deadlines.

*Values fit: Do what you say • Do the right thing • Gumption • Stick-to-itiveness • Passion/Enthusiasm.



Nice-to-Have

*Customer Service / Appointment Setting experience

*GC pre-con/bid desk experience or supplier/manufacturer rep background.

*Existing DFW sub network across interiors, ground-up flex/industrial, retail shells.



Key KPIs & Scorecard (reported weekly)

*% trade packages with 3+ bids (primary KPI)

*Avg. bids per trade

title: Fulltime (8hrs a day) Creative Marketing Assistant for a Christian Speaker, Author, & Host
description:
We are seeking a dedicated, adaptable, and enthusiastic Creative Marketing Assistant to support the CEO of a motivational, faith-based brand. This role requires daily live work sessions, providing direct, real-time assistance with a variety of marketing and operational tasks. If you thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced, and dynamic environment rooted in empowerment and Christian values, we invite you to apply.



Schedule & Work Environment:



Live Work Sessions: Monday through Friday, between 9 AM - 10 PM CST conducted on Google Meet.

Engagement Requirements: Must have your camera on and screen shared for the duration of live work sessions to foster collaboration, real-time support, and security.



Key Responsibilities:



Market Trend Research & Implementation: Identify and apply relevant trends to the brand’s marketing strategies. Research Opportunities and assist with opportunity applications.



Graphic & Video Design: Assist in creating social media graphics, flyers, presentations (Canva), and simple promotional videos (Capcut, Canva).




 Marketing & Administrative Support: Support
 campaigns, newsletters, and vendor communications. Handle routine administrative tasks as needed.



Social Media Management: Assist with content creation and scheduling using tools like Vista Social, including potential support for social media ads.



Website Maintenance & E-commerce Support: Update the brand’s Wix website and e-commerce store, ensuring timely product and content updates.



Project & Team Coordination: Work with the project manager and other specialists to ensure timely completion of milestones and tasks.



Operational Support: Conduct backend brand operations, analytics, vendor research, and various other duties.



Administrative Assistance: Maintain & Monitor CEO's calendar, monitor
s, make phone calls, etc.



Ideal Candidate Profile:



Collaborative & Flexible: Works well in a dynamic environment, ready to adapt and pivot as necessary.



Creative & Organized: Demonstrates creativity and organization, with strong attention to detail in marketing initiatives.



Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, Trello, Canva, Generative AI, and a willingness to learn other tools as needed.



Compensation & Expectations:



Hourly Rate: $5/hour. Increases are possible based on performance, reliability, and alignment with the brand's goals.



Commitment: This role requires full engagement during live work sessions. Please do not apply if you are unable to meet the schedule, have great internet connection, and work in a virtual environment with camera on and screen sharing, or if the budget does not align with your expectations.





Tools Used:

Google Meet, Google Tools, Slack, Trello, Capcut, Meta, Canva, Adobe Suite, etc.

Willingness to learn and adapt to new tools and technologies is essential.



To apply, please complete the following:

Answer all pre-screening questions.



Important Note:

This role demands dedication and active participation during daily live sessions. If you cannot commit to this schedule, work style, or hourly budget, we respectfully ask that you refrain from applying. We are looking for individuals ready to invest their talents, creativity, and time to grow and thrive with our team.

title: Ticket Broker VA – Daily Repricing  – MUST be fast + accurate (2–3 hrs/day)
description:
READ THIS FIRST: This job is for a ticket broker. You will be repricing ~200 event ticket listings daily using a web-based ticket inventory/pricing tool and a source website.



If you are not detail-oriented, not good with basic math, or you do not have the required computer setup, do not apply.



What you will do (daily)



Update listing prices based on source availability/pricing checks



Stay competitive by undercutting comparable competitors by $1 when allowed



Use the tool’s Proceeds/Net section to confirm profit minimums (below)



If source shows Sold out / Waitlist / Unavailable ? pause/deactivate listing and notify me



When comparing competitors, ignore competitor listings with quantity = 1



Do NOT add events, do NOT change quantities, price edits only



Profit minimums (MUST follow — verify using Proceeds/Net)



GA / General Admission / “GA ENTRY ANYTIME”



Source cost under $65 ? min profit $12



Source cost $65–$100 ? min profit $18



Source cost $100–$140 ? min profit $25



VIP



Source cost under $140 ? min profit $25



Source cost $140–$180 ? min profit $35



Source cost over $180 ? min profit $50



Rule: Undercut by $1 only if the profit minimum still holds. If it doesn’t, do NOT undercut.



Schedule



2–3 hours/day, 7 days/week



Preferred working window: 8–11 AM ET



REQUIRED computer setup (NO exceptions)



You must have one of the following BEFORE you start:



Dual monitors, OR



Laptop + external monitor, OR



Ultrawide monitor



You must be able to keep two windows open side-by-side (pricing tool + source site).



You must list monitor sizes (in inches) in your application.



Experience (preferred)



Experience with pricing/inventory on ANY of the following is preferred:



Marketplaces: eBay, Amazon, StockX, Shopify, etc.



Ticketing/resale workflows



Repricing, inventory management, product research



Contacting support teams via
/chat (back-office/POS type tools)



Experience fit (REQUIRED in your application)



In 4–6 sentences, explain:



Which previous job is most similar to this role



What tools/platforms you used (marketplaces, pricing tools, spreadsheets, support systems)



What you did daily that matches this job (pricing updates, research, inventory checks, rule-based work)



What results you achieved (speed/accuracy/volume)



Applications that do not clearly connect past experience to this role will be ignored.



Paid test (required)



1-hour screenshare test (paid)



If you pass, you start a 3-day trial



Confidentiality



You will access private business systems. No sharing logins, screenshots, or processes.



IMPORTANT: Skill verification at the start of the interview



At the beginning of the interview, you will complete a quick verification:



Show your monitor setup (display settings)



Basic math questions (no calculator)



Short rule-comprehension check



Quick computer/navigation check (tabs + split screen)



If you cannot pass the verification, we will end the interview and will not proceed to the paid trial.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (must complete ALL)



If you do not answer every question below, you will be ignored.



Start your message with this exact line:

ORANGE FROG – I will NOT guess.



Monitor setup (required): list your device + monitor sizes



Example: “Laptop + 24” external monitor” or “Dual monitors 24” + 27”



Experience fit (required): In 4–6 sentences, explain how your most relevant past job fits this role (pricing, marketplaces, inventory, research, support systems, spreadsheets).



Marketplace/pricing experience (preferred): list platform + what you did + how long



Examples: eBay, Amazon, StockX, Shopify, ticket platforms, etc.



Basic math (NO calculator):



12 + 43 =



67 – 28 =



50% of 120 =



150% of 80 =



If fees are 12% on $100, the fee amount is =



Rule comprehension (answer in your own words):



If you are unsure the event matches on the source site, what do you do?



If being $1 cheaper breaks the profit minimum, what do you do?



If source is sold out/waitlist/unavailable, what do you do?



Do you ignore competitor quantity = 1? (Yes/No)



Availability: confirm 7 days/week + 2–3 hrs/day + your preferred times in ET



Proof (after shortlist): confirm you can show display settings (monitor setup) and screenshare during the interview



Note: If your application is generic copy/paste or does not answer every question, it will be ignored.

title: CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)
description:
Job Title

CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)



READ THIS FIRST 

This role is for someone with deep, hands-on ownership of CINC Systems.

If your experience is limited to using CINC, assisting with setup, or following instructions created by someone else, do not apply.

We are specifically looking for someone who has built, configured, and owned multiple parts of CINC Systems in real HOA/Condo environments.



ROLE SUMMARY 

We are hiring a CINC Systems expert with a deep understanding of how CINC works end-to-end. You will be responsible for configuring, improving, and supporting multiple CINC modules, automations, workflows, and reporting structures.

This is not a narrow role. You are expected to understand how different modules interact and how configuration decisions impact operations, accounting, boards, and homeowners.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

You will personally:

• Configure and maintain CINC Systems environments

• Set up, customize, and optimize multiple CINC modules, such as:

o     Violations

o     Work Orders / Maintenance

o     Accounting-related workflows

o    Owner & Board portals

o    Vendors and services

o    Reporting and dashboards

• Build and manage:

o    Automation rules

o    Triggers and workflows

o    Custom fields and layouts

• Support system launches, migrations, and cleanups

• Create clear documentation for system logic and configuration

• Troubleshoot complex CINC issues independently

• Act as a senior internal resource before escalating to CINC support



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  (Non-Negotiable)

You must clearly demonstrate all of the following:

• Direct, hands-on experience building inside CINC Systems

• Experience configuring multiple CINC modules, not just one

• Strong understanding of how CINC behaves across:

o    Operations

o    Accounting

o    Compliance

o    Board and homeowner workflows

• Ability to explain why configuration and automation decisions were made

• Comfort owning systems without step-by-step instructions

If you have only “helped,” “assisted,” or “supported” CINC work created by others, this role is not a fit.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Applicants should be prepared to:

• Submit a resume with their application

• Discuss systems they have personally built

• Explain automation decisions and tradeoffs

• Demonstrate ownership, not assistance

You will be asked to give real examples. General or vague answers will be disqualified.



WORKING CONIDTIONS 

• Full-time remote, Independent Contractor

• Flexible EST-aligned hours

o    Pre-launch: Flexible, provided deliverables and communication are met

o    Post-launch: Expected overlap with standard business hours (9–5 or 10–6 EST)

• Occasional weekend work during launch phases

o    Not frequent

o    Communicated in advance

• Time tracking required (Hubstaff)



Must have:

• Personal computer used exclusively for work

• Backup computer, internet, and power

• Quiet, professional workspace



Compensation & Growth

• $9/hour starting rate

• Hourly rate increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term contractor relationship intended

• Opportunity to help shape systems, processes, and your own role as Sliceo grows

This role is designed for someone looking for long-term stability and ownership, not short-term task work.



CONFIDENTIALITY 

This role involves access to sensitive systems, internal strategy, and proprietary information. Strict confidentiality is required.



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS 

Applicants must answer the following:

Describe your hands-on experience with CINC Systems.



Include:

1. Which CINC modules you personally configured or built

2. One automation or workflow you owned end-to-end

3. A system decision you made and why you made it

4. How many years have you used CINC Systems?



***Applications without a resume or without clear ownership examples will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Rep
description:
Job description:



Sales Partner – Estate & Brand Outreach (Flexible/Commission-Based)



TAKE QUIZ HERE: 
 





Are you an experienced sales professional seeking a flexible, entrepreneurial side opportunity? 110 Street Logistics is expanding, and we’re looking for a dynamic, self-motivated sales partner to help us grow key relationships.



What You’ll Do:



Identify and call estate sale companies, libraries, real estate agents, and potential brand/wholesale partners.

Build relationships that lead to book pickups (for estate sales) or business partnerships (brands/wholesale).

Each successful estate sale book pickup you generate earns $20—scaling passively as accounts grow.

Flexible hours: Make calls when it fits your schedule.

Who You Are:



You have sales experience—ideally in real estate, wholesale, or similar.

You’re proactive and excited about earning via commission with long-term potential.

You thrive on flexibility and are looking to add income alongside existing work.

Why Join Us:



Be part of a growing business with future expansion into multiple sales channels.

Full support and training on our unique pitch and process.

Unlimited earning potential as your accounts grow.

If you want a flexible, relationship-building role with room to scale—let’s talk!



Responsibilities



Performance Expectations & Quota



This is a performance-driven role with clear activity and results expectations. Success in this position comes from consistent outreach and relationship building.



Minimum Weekly Activity Expectations:



Outbound Activity
outbound calls per week to generate new leads

10–20 new leads added to your pipeline per week

10–20 follow-ups with existing leads

Pipeline Development



5–10 qualified leads per week expressing interest in working with us

2–4 new deals progressing toward active partnership status

Results Expectations



Target: 4–10 deals generated per month after initial ramp period

Each deal you generate earns $20 commission

Deals can produce recurring commissions as relationships develop

What Success Looks Like



Successful sales partners typically:



Build and manage 25–75 active leads

Generate consistent weekly deal flow

Create recurring monthly commission from past deals

Earn $500–$2,000+ per month, with significant growth potential

Ramp Period



First 30 Days:

Focus on lead generation and pipeline development



Months 2–3:

Deals begin closing and commissions begin compounding



Months 3+:

Strong performers generate consistent recurring income from established deals



Requirements



Proven experience in inside sales, technical sales, or B2B sales roles with a track record of meeting or exceeding targets

Strong negotiation skills coupled with excellent communication abilities in English

Familiarity with CRM software like Salesforce or similar platforms for managing customer relationships effectively

Experience with telemarketing, outbound calling, and warm calling techniques to engage prospects proactively

Knowledge of technology sales or related industries is highly desirable

Demonstrated ability to develop new business opportunities through strategic outreach and follow-up

Exceptional customer service skills with a focus on building long-term client relationships

Join us in transforming the way businesses connect with innovative solutions! This paid position offers an engaging environment where your sales talents can truly shine. Embrace the flexibility of remote work while making a tangible impact on our growth journey.



Benefits:





Flexible schedule

Work from home

Work Location: Remote





We are NOT looking for "pitchmen," script-readers, or aggressive closers. We are looking for Sales Detectives. Our methodology is built on a "Curiosity-First" philosophy—if you start a call by talking about yourself or our services, you have already lost. We only hire individuals who can maintain high-level psychological control of a conversation through insightful questioning.



Mandatory Technical Requirements

To be considered for this role, you must possess:



A Personal Power Dialer: You must have your own reliable system/software for high-volume outbound calling.



US Connectivity: The ability to make crystal-clear, lag-free calls to the United States.



Verified Experience: A proven track record in outbound prospecting or appointment setting.



The Selection Process (Read Carefully)

This questionnaire is your first interview. We do not look at resumes until we have reviewed these answers.



Performance-Based: Only the top 5% of scorers will be contacted for a live interview.



The Goal: We are looking for responses that demonstrate you can lower a prospect's "sales alarm," identify hidden pain points, and lead a prospect to believe that doing business with us was their idea.



If you provide generic, "salesy," or low-effort answers, your application will be automatically disqualified. If you are a student of the craft and ready to impress, please begin the exam below.

title: Amazon Wholesale Lead VA (KeHE) — QA + PO Builder + Reconciliation | Proof Required | Philippines Only
description:

Strong Google Sheets/Excel (filters + formulas; pivots preferred)



Clear written English and professional reporting



Philippines-based only

Compensation



Paid trial week with scorecard



$2.00–$2.50/hr to start (based on performance)



Weekly payments via Wise / Payoneer / PayPal



Hours/rate increase after consistent performance

Produce a final $1,500 PO buy list + backup list

Must hit ?95?curacy on math, proof, and formatting.



How to Apply (Must Answer All)



Confirm you are applying for Lead/QA VA



Hourly rate expectation



Tools you actively use (Keepa, SellerAmp, RevSeller, etc.)

Promo discount: 17%

a) Post-promo cost per unit?

b) Gross margin % (ignore Amazon fees)?

c) One specific wholesale/FBA risk to check before buying?



2–3 time slots for a 20–30 min call (EST)



Thank you,

Travon Epps

Aspen Global Strategies

title: AI Content Creator
description:

title: Lead Delivery Virtual Assistant
description:
We’re hiring a Lead Delivery Virtual Assistant to help keep our cold
 campaigns running smoothly and consistently. This role is all about ensuring a steady flow of high-quality leads and flawless outbound execution. If you’re detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and motivated to grow into a full-time position, we’d love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

Scrape, enrich, and verify leads from a variety of sources.

Load leads into Smartlead.ai (or similar) and set up outbound campaigns.

Segment and refine prospect lists for accurate targeting.

Build and test
 sequences (subject lines, copy, timing).

Track campaign metrics (open, reply, bounce rates).

Troubleshoot deliverability issues and maintain a strong sender reputation.

Focus exclusively on lead delivery and campaign execution, ensuring all replies route to the sales/client-facing team.



What We’re Looking For

Experience in lead generation, scraping, and enrichment.

Familiarity with Smartlead.ai or other cold
 platforms.

Knowledge of
 campaign setup, sequencing, and A/B testing.

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage structured processes.

Comfort with analyzing performance data and suggesting improvements.

Self-motivated, organized, and reliable with excellent communication skills.



Growth Path

Starts as a part-time role.

Opportunity to transition into full-time as lead volume and campaigns increase.

Be part of a growing team where your contributions directly impact results.



Why Join Us

100% Remote Work — enjoy flexibility while staying fully connected.

Standard Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM ICT.

Competitive Pay: 30,000 – 50,000 depending on experience.

Supportive, collaborative team culture.

Clear career path and the chance to master industry-standard tools.

title: Sales & Client Success Representative
description:
We’re hiring a Sales & Client Success Representative to engage with prospects from our cold
 campaigns and help turn them into long-term clients.

In this role, you’ll be the first point of contact, responding quickly and professionally to inbound replies, keeping conversations organized, and leading onboarding calls.



If you’re detail-oriented, confident in client communication, and excited to grow into a closing role, we’d love to hear from you.



Responsibilities

• Respond promptly and professionally to all inbound replies from Smartlead campaigns.

• Manage and organize inbox communication (sorting, tagging, follow-ups).

• Escalate hot leads to management as needed.

• Schedule and conduct client onboarding calls.

• Ensure smooth handoff from outreach to client success.

• Track communication history to ensure no lead goes idle.



Qualifications

• 1–2 years experience in a client-facing or sales support role.

• Strong written and spoken English; able to handle U.S.-based client communication with confidence.

• With broad experience with CRM tools (GoHighLevel)

• Experience managing inbox replies (Smartlead.ai).

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to juggle multiple conversations without losing track.

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and escalate issues when needed.



Salary & Work Setup

PHP 30,000 – 50,000 (depending on experience)

Part-Time to Full-Time transition as workload scales

Work Hours: 9 AM – 5 PM ICT (10 AM – 6 PM Manila time)

100% Remote

title: Senior B2B Outbound SDR – UK/EU Fleets & International Distributor Development
description:
Senior B2B Outbound SDR – UK, Europe & International Distributor Development



Full-Time | Performance-Based Growth Role



About ShoulderSink



ShoulderSink is a European manufacturer of professional mobile hand hygiene systems used primarily in commercial vehicles. More than 50,000 professionals use our systems across multiple markets. We are a small team and operate strictly B2B and work with fleet customers and national distributors.



We are expanding across the UK, Europe and selected international markets, including relevant markets such as US and Japan.



The Role

This is a performance-driven outbound role focused on building qualified pipeline in:



- UK fleet market

- European fleet customers

- International distributor markets (including US, Japan and other relevant regions)



This is a full-time role designed for long-term growth. Continued development and expanded responsibility are performance-based.



What You Will Do

- Fleet Development (UK & Europe)

-Cold outreach to fleet managers, operations directors and HSE managers

- Identify current hygiene practices in commercial vehicles

- Generate qualified fleet trials

- Secure structured commercial evaluation meetings

- Distributor Development (International)

- Identify and contact national distributors and importers

- Qualify commercial capability and market coverage

- Secure evaluation meetings

- Move prospects to structured next steps



Over time - International Growth Support

- Contribute to market research and expansion strategy

- Support international trade show preparation

- Potential participation in selected international activities based on performance



General Responsibilities

- High-volume outbound outreach (calls + follow-up)

- Structured CRM documentation

- KPI accountability and weekly reporting



What We Expect

- 3+ years outbound B2B experience

- Proven experience calling US or UK decision-makers

- Strong commercial mindset

- Confident objection handling

- CRM discipline

- Clear, professional English



We are not hiring call-center telemarketers. We are hiring a commercially minded outbound professional capable of engaging decision-makers.



Compensation

- $1,600/month base salary

- Commission per qualified fleet trial

- Commission per qualified distributor evaluation

- 5% first-year revenue share on sourced accounts



Total earnings are STRONGLY performance-driven.



Growth Opportunity

This role is structured for long-term development. Increased responsibility, broader international exposure and participation in trade activities are based on measurable results.



Application Requirement

To apply, please include:

- A short written summary of your outbound B2B experience

- A 60-second audio recording introducing yourself and pitching a B2B product

- Applications without an audio introduction will not be reviewed.

- Make sure the DISC is filled on your profile.

title: AI Video Creator (TikTok)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced creator who can handle the entire process of making TikTok reaction videos using a hyper-realistic AI character.



What you will do:



* Create and manage a hyper-realistic AI character (“Gabriella”) – face/body and expressions

* Generate and sync AI voice for the character

* Source funny/interesting clips that are legal to reuse (permission, stock, Creative Commons, etc.)

* Plan quick hooks and reactions (simple scripts)

* Edit full 1-minute vertical videos for TikTok:



* Clip + AI character on screen the whole time

* Cuts, timing, captions, sound, export

* Deliver at least 3 finished videos per 8-hour workday



Requirements:



* You already know how to:



* Build/use AI avatars and AI voice

* Create reaction-style short-form content

* Edit TikTok/Reels/Shorts at a high level

* Experience sourcing clips and checking if they are allowed to be reused (copyright/licence aware)

* Good English and strong attention to detail

* Reliable computer and internet

* Can work 5–6 days per week

* No beginners, no training provided – you must be fully capable from day one



Tools and payment:



* We will pay for the digital tools you need (AI avatar, AI voice, etc.), once agreed

* Competitive hourly rate in USD, based on experience and output



How to apply:

Send:



1. A short intro about you

2. 3–5 examples of short-form videos you’ve fully created (ideally reaction or AI/character-based)

3. Any examples of AI avatar or AI voice work

4. The tools you currently use

5. Your hourly rate in USD and how many hours per day you can work

title: Virtual Receptionist VA (Remote) | Fast Hiring – 24-Hour Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Marketing Strategy & Campaign Manager
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Marketing Strategy & Campaign Manager to work directly with one or more client businesses. In this role, you will guide marketing efforts that drive engagement, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.



This position combines strategic marketing planning with hands-on execution and coordination. You will help develop marketing strategies, oversee campaigns, support content creation, and ensure that marketing activities align with business priorities and measurable outcomes.



--------------------------------------------------



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Marketing Strategy & Planning

- Develop marketing plans aligned with business growth and revenue goals

- Identify opportunities to increase engagement with current customers and attract new ones

- Create structured marketing calendars that guide campaigns, promotions, and initiatives

- Monitor performance and recommend adjustments to improve results



Campaign Management

- Plan and coordinate marketing campaigns across
, social media, and digital channels

- Ensure campaign messaging remains consistent across platforms

- Support initiatives designed to generate inquiries, increase conversions, and strengthen customer relationships

- Track campaign performance and report on results



Customer Re-Engagement & Retention

- Identify opportunities to reconnect with past customers or inactive leads

- Assist with outreach campaigns designed to encourage repeat engagement

- Work with customer data to segment audiences and tailor messaging

- Support campaigns designed to increase repeat purchases, service upgrades, or additional offerings



Social Media Strategy & Oversight

- Provide strategic direction for social media content and campaigns

- Ensure content supports broader marketing priorities and promotions

- Coordinate repurposing content across multiple platforms, including short-form video platforms such as TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Review analytics and recommend improvements to increase reach and engagement



Content Creation & Content Coordination

- Create or assist with marketing content such as social media posts,
 campaigns, blog articles, and promotional materials

- Draft marketing copy for campaigns, announcements, and outreach initiatives

- Work with designers, editors, or other tea
mbers when additional creative support is needed

- Repurpose existing content into new formats for different platforms



Marketing Coordination

- Maintain marketing calendars and ensure campaigns are executed on schedule

- Coordinate with content creators, designers, or tea
mbers to align messaging

- Assist with implementing marketing tools, workflows, and automation processes when needed



Data & Performance Tracking

- Monitor marketing metrics such as engagement, leads, and conversions

- Prepare reports or summaries to help evaluate marketing performance

- Recommend improvements based on performance trends and data insights



Handling Confidential Information

- Maintain strict confidentiality when handling client data, marketing strategies, and internal documents

- Follow established processes to protect sensitive information and business data



--------------------------------------------------



WHAT YOU NEED (REQUIRED)



- 2–5 years of experience in marketing strategy, campaign management, digital marketing, or a related role

- Strong written and spoken English skills

- Experience planning and executing marketing campaigns tied to measurable outcomes

- Experience creating or coordinating marketing content for social media and

- Understanding of social media strategy and digital marketing channels

- Experience with
 marketing platforms or marketing automation tools

- Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple campaigns and priorities

- Ability to analyze marketing data and identify opportunities for improvement

- Comfortable working remotely and collaborating with distributed teams

- Reliable, fast internet connection and a quiet workspace

- Availability to work with overlap during US business hours



--------------------------------------------------



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A PLUS)



- Experience working with service-based businesses or small business marketing

- Familiarity with CRM systems and customer segmentation

- Experience with analytics tools such as Google Analytics or social media insights

- Exposure to marketing tools such as HubSpot, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or similar platforms

- Experience coordinating short-form video or social media content strategies

- Background in customer retention, lifecycle marketing, or lead generation campaigns



--------------------------------------------------



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a remote-first company that supports busy professionals and growing businesses by providing skilled remote tea
mbers who help with operations, marketing, and administrative work.



Since 2015, we have supported clients across multiple industries by helping them save time and focus on high-impact priorities. Our tea
mbers work closely with business owners and executives to support growth, efficiency, and long-term success.



We are selective about who we hire because our clients rely on dependable, high-quality support. Our team values professionalism, clear communication, collaboration, and consistently delivering great work.



--------------------------------------------------

description:

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
***Specifically real estate cold calling experience required. If you don't have it, please don't waste time applying.

100?herence to scripts, CRM tracking, and process

Fluency in English; accent must be clear and build rapport with U.S. sellers

Details:

-$5/hour

**-Bonus structure: For the first few months, the commission rate is set at 2%. After this initial period, we will review performance and commission rates. Top performers who consistently deliver strong results and exceed all key metrics will be eligible for a commission increase of up to 5% of net profits per deal.



Our compensation model is designed so that commissions should exceed hourly wages over the course of a year for successful tea ---------- mbers.











HOW TO APPLY:

 with your resume attached and a brief overview of your relevant experience in the body of the

, write the USD hourly rate (or salary, but specify hourly, monthly, etc and currency) of your last two roles listed on resume. For example:

This is simply information needed for us internally as we try to understand your career path. PLEASE BE HONEST, as this may be officially verified later on in the hiring process.

, explaining your relevant experience. If you don't follow the above 3-step instructions in how to apply, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Mortgage Loan Coordinator
description:
U.S.-based mortgage brokerage seeking an experienced Mortgage Loan Coordinator to manage the front end of our loan pipeline. This role is responsible for borrower intake, document collection, and preparing loan files for broker review.



We are looking for someone who is highly organized, proactive, and experienced in mortgage workflows. This position requires prior mortgage industry experience and familiarity with loan applications and borrower documentation.



Important: Mortgage experience is required. Candidates without mortgage experience will not be considered.



Key Responsibilities



• Contact new loan applicants within two hours of application submission

• Conduct borrower intake calls and gather missing application information

• Review loan applications and ensure information is complete and accurate

• Assist with preparing and updating the 1003 loan application

• Send document checklists and follow up with borrowers for required documents

• Prepare loan files for broker review within 24 hours of application

• Maintain an organized pipeline and track loan status updates

• Communicate with borrowers regarding missing documentation and next steps

• Assist with preparing pre approval documentation once loan terms are determined

• Ensure loan files are organized and ready for processing when a contract is received



Required Qualifications



• Previous mortgage industry experience is required

• Experience working with loan applications and borrower documentation

• Familiarity with the 1003 loan application

• Experience using Arive LOS or a similar mortgage loan origination system

• Strong attention to detail and organization

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• Ability to follow structured workflows and checklists

• Reliable internet connection and professional remote workspace



Work Schedule



• Monday through Friday

• 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time

• Must be available during U.S. business hours

• Willingness to work occasional overtime for scheduled borrower calls if needed



Please message a copy of your resume.

title: SEO Strategist
description:
TO APPLY: Complete the form 



SEO STRATEGIST

The SEO Strategist is responsible for owning and executing comprehensive SEO strategies across their assigned portfolio of clients. This includes analyzing performance, creating actionable roadmaps, managing content and optimization planning, and resolving client-specific SEO issues. Strategists play a critical cross-functional role in ensuring SEO is aligned with the broader goals of client success, advertising, content, and technical performance.



This role requires strong analytical skills, independent initiative, and the ability to collaborate across departments to drive consistent organic growth. This role requires working US business hours.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

1. Strategic SEO Execution

Create and maintain tailored SEO roadmaps aligned with client business goals and site performance.

Analyze metrics using internal tools and manual review to generate monthly SEO Strategy & Performance Reviews.

Recommend and plan actionable improvements to content, optimization, links, or site structure based on performance.

Track and update performance metrics and client status in the strategy scorecard.



2. Support Ticket Triage & Client Issue Resolution

Monitor and respond to SEO-related support tickets from Client Strategy and other teams.

Conduct root-cause analysis and prepare a resolution plan or delegate tasks to relevant internal tea
mbers.



3. Link Planning & GBP Management

Plan and oversee monthly backlink strategy per client, ensuring diversity, quality, and alignment with budget 

Perform monthly GBP audits for each client and monitor lead performance; if leads drop, use this as a trigger for GBP optimization.



4. Content & Optimization Planning

Develop 6-month-long content & optimization plans in alignment with SEO goals.



5. GEO & AI-Driven Innovation

Leverage Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) best practices to increase visibility in AI-generated search experiences (e.g., Google SGE, Bing Copilot).

Identify and implement on-page changes or structural content improvements to enhance performance in emerging SERP formats.



6. Cross-Team Collaboration

Collaborate closely with:

Content: for page updates and optimization execution.

Client Strategy: to stay synced on client goals, concerns, or shifting priorities.

Web Team: for technical SEO execution: report site speed, crawl/indexing, schema, or UX issues.



7. Team Support & Peer Reviews

Perform quality reviews for peer strategists.

Provide feedback on quality, roadmap recommendations, or planning assumptions.

Participate in 1:1s or team check-ins to identify areas for improvement or share solutions.





CORE EXPECTATIONS:

Our reputation hinges on our clients' success. Our clients pay us for outcomes. We invest whatever time is needed to support clients in achieving their goals. We don’t cap the time it takes to achieve this outcome.



1. Be Fully Engaged. We are completely committed to this company/mission and determined to do whatever it takes to help our clients win. It’s in our DNA to go above & beyond the call of duty. We give it our all and always look for ways to raise the bar.



2. Be Resourceful. We take pride in figuring things out and solving problems without being given the exact step-by-step instructions. If we get stuck, we try to solve it ourselves before asking. If you could have solved it by contacting support or doing a Google search first...then we do that.



3. Be Responsive. We are on top of the ball & quick to reply when someone on the team or a member sends a message. If we get a Slack, call, or
, we respond as quickly as possible & always close the loop.



4. Be A Team Player. We understand that WE is greater than I. We don’t take a “that's not my job” perspective but always look to bring new ideas & offer a helping hand. We look for ways to improve things, make suggestions and enhance our operations. 



5. Be Passionate. We LOVE what we do and are passionate about helping our clients. We truly enjoy learning & developing our skills. We are positive-oriented & bring energy to those around us.





ABOUT CONSTELLATION:

Constellation Marketing is a rapidly growing digital marketing firm based in Atlanta, Georgia and founded in 2017. Our international team has grown from 1 to over 40 employees and contractors, and our clientele has grown to 85+ clients. Our monthly marketing programs, centered on SEO and digital advertising, are specifically built to drive growth at law firms. We have a track record of helping law firms move from relying on referrals to producing game-changing business growth-- and we have the data to back this up. Our high retention rate among clients is a testament to this fact.

title: Legal Medical Records Clerk
description:
Position Summary



The Medical Records Clerk is responsible for obtaining, organizing, reviewing, and tracking all medical records and billing documentation for personal injury cases. This role supports case managers, demand writers, and attorneys by ensuring complete, accurate, and timely medical documentation necessary for treatment monitoring, claim valuation, and settlement demands.



This position requires strong attention to detail, organization, and the ability to manage high-volume record requests while maintaining HIPAA compliance.



Key Responsibilities:

Medical Records & Billing Requests

Request medical records, itemized bills, and imaging from healthcare providers, hospitals, clinics, and specialists

Send HIPAA authorizations and follow up regularly until records are received

Track outstanding requests and maintain a follow-up schedule

Escalate delayed providers to supervisors when necessary

Documentation Management

Review incoming records for completeness and legibility

Verify date ranges match treatment timeline

Upload and properly label records in the case management system

Organize files chronologically for easy review by case managers and attorneys

Billing & Lien Documentation

Request itemized billing statements and balance confirmations

Track balances for providers and lienholders

Obtain final bills once treatment concludes

Coordinate with lien resolution teams when applicable

Internal Case Support

Notify case managers when records/bills are received

Flag missing treatment gaps or incomplete documentation

Assist demand writers by compiling complete medical packages

Prepare record sets for settlement, mediation, or litigation when requested



Compliance:

Maintain strict HIPAA and confidentiality compliance

Ensure all authorizations are valid before requesting records



Qualifications:

High school diploma or equivalent

3+ year administrative or records experience (legal or medical preferred)

Strong organizational and time management skills

Ability to manage high-volume workload with deadlines

Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Preferred:

Experience in a personal injury plaintiff law firm

Familiarity with medical terminology and treatment types

Experience requesting records from hospitals and large provider systems

Experience with legal case management software - Neos



Key Skills:

Detail-oriented

Persistent follow-up ability

Strong documentation habits

Professional phone/email communication

Ability to prioritize urgent requests

title: Property Management Customer Service Representative
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



The Nabo Group is looking for Customer Service Representatives with Property Management experience for our growing team, who enjoys solving problems, responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable to join our fun/hard working team. You must have excellent communication skills.



As a Customer Service Representative, you will play a critical role in fostering positive relationships with our clients and ensuring that their maintenance needs are met effectively and efficiently. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and help maintain our reputation for excellence in the maintenance industry.



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Client Communication: Act as the primary point of contact for clients, providing exceptional customer service and ensuring clear and professional communication. Respond to client inquiries via phone,
, and online platforms.

- Maintenance Coordination: Work closely with the maintenance team to schedule, track, and coordinate maintenance services, ensuring timely and accurate completion of tasks.

- Issue Resolution: Address and resolve client complaints or concerns regarding maintenance services in a timely, professional, and empathetic manner.

- Client Scheduling & Follow-Up: Schedule appointments for maintenance services and follow up with clients’ post-service to ensure satisfaction and gather feedback.

- Database Management: Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of client interactions, maintenance schedules, and work orders within the company’s CRM system.

- Problem Solving & Troubleshooting: Provide quick solutions to client issues and coordinate any necessary follow-up or additional service visits.

- Collaboration: Work closely with field technicians, supervisors, and other tea
mbers to ensure the smooth flow of maintenance services from start to finish.

- Service Knowledge: Stay informed about the company’s maintenance offerings and ensure clients are fully aware of the services available to them.

- Reporting & Documentation: Document client interactions, service requests, and resolutions. Generate reports to track the progress and outcomes of maintenance activities.

- Performs other duties that may be assigned from time to time.



Desired Qualifications:

- College degree or equivalent work experience.

- Experience with Real Estate is a plus.

- At least 6 months of experience working remotely.

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written).

- Excellent interpersonal skills, problem solving, and analytical skills.

- Strong customer service skills.

- Ability to multi-task and prioritize.

- Reliable and dependable.

- Excellent problem-solving skills.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure.

- Attention to details and highly organized.

- Great time management skills.

- Capable of keeping control of the call even when the customer is angry.

- Ethical and trustworthy.

- Great at relationship-building.

- Ability to work under minimal supervision.

- Friendly and fair.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work in US Time Zone

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.

- The schedules are permanent and assigned by the department’s Manager. Schedules might change eventually depending on demand.

- Must have own work equipment that is not older than 2 years.

- Work equipment must be personal and not a family or shared computer/laptop.

- Internet speed must be no lower than 150 Mbps.

- Must have backup internet for emergencies (no lower than 100 Mbps) and a place to relocate during power or internet outages.



Compensation & Benefits:

- $6 USD per hour.

- PTO after 90 days of probationary period.

- HMO allowance after 90 days of probationary period.



How to apply:

1. Send an
 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

2. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour.

3. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description.

title: Insurance Verification Specialist
description:
Company Background:

A quickly growing real estate investment company is seeking a new tea
mber to help guide families through the process of purchasing their forever home. We pride ourselves on helping them by solving a problem they didn’t think there was a solution for.  We have had people cry because they were so thankful that we purchased their house or sold them a home.  We also help people buy a home that wouldn’t qualify for a traditional bank loan.  It is an excellent and exciting feeling!



Our positions do not require prior real estate experience because we will slowly teach the industry.  We have a hard-working yet fun and energetic team that is mainly remote-based.  We spend time on professional and personal development for all employees and end the week with Dad Joke Fridays.



This is an excellent opportunity to learn more about the real estate industry and the non-retail method of buying and selling properties.  You will work closely with the business owner and take on more responsibilities over time.  We are only looking for a full-time role but are flexible with our work schedule as we don’t track sick or time off days, you are a professional and would be treated that way.  



Job Description:

As our Insurance Verification Specialist, you will use your strong communication skills with buyers and tenants to refine their insurance needs.  After the disposition team sells a property, you will manage the intricate details with the homeowner/tenant, mortgage company, and insurance provider.  This role requires attention to detail and good problem-solving skills as you will be helping people through one of the most stressful activities of their lives: buying their family home.



With your strong analytical skills, you will review and verify policies, ensuring accuracy and compliance throughout transactions, and be the single point of contact for both the buyer/tenant and the loan servicing company. You will be responsible for maintaining an up-to-date record of tasks in Salesforce, our CRM.



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented and dedicated and possesses excellent organizational skills. The more experience you have in real estate, the better, but it is not required for this role.  We will conduct on-the-job training as you grow into the role over time.  



Messages from current tea
mbers: Here is a collection of short videos from existing tea
mbers on their thoughts on working with us.  We pride ourselves on our culture and would love to add you to our team:  
 



Responsibilities and Duties:

* Enter insurance details into Salesforce

* Communicate with Insurance companies to update records and manage claims

* Provide borrowers with a list of insurance agents and assist in obtaining coverage

* Manage insurance renewals by communicating with borrowers and renters

* Serve as a liaison between all parties involved, establishing effective communication channels until closing.

* Maintain an updated record of all completed tasks in the Salesforce CRM

* Organize and maintain document filing in our database.

* Update the seller's insurance contact details for our records.

* Obtain insurance quotes from agents for newly contracted properties.

* Cancel the seller's insurance policy after closing and ensure the refund is sent to our designated mailing address

* Secure new insurance policies for newly purchased properties.

* Build training guides to outline all processes you complete regularly

* Perform a variety of other miscellaneous tasks



Perks:

* $5.75/hr ($11,960/year)

* $50.00 Bonus when we sell a property (estimated $1,750/year)

* .5% Commission on insurance claims paid out (estimated $1,125/year)

* Health Insurance 

* Flexible work schedule

* 13th month pay

* We want to make sure you are well compensated for your work efforts and are only looking for full-time employees.



Qualifications

* Bachelor’s Degree

* VA experience for at least 2 years

* Attention to detail across all projects

* Fluent in English - written and verbal

* Proficient with Google Drive/Docs/Sheets, Salesforce, Dropbox, and Slack

* Familiar with Mac; if you don't have one, we can help you get one if so desired 

* Consistent, reliable, and fast internet connection

  

---------------

Why should you join us over anyone and everyone else? 

1) Steady paycheck with the chance for bonuses based on performance 

2) Opportunity to work from home without a boss breathing down your neck 

3) Team environment where you work with others to share the workload



How do you know if you’re qualified for this opportunity? 

We don’t care if you have prior experience in the real estate field.  We can teach you everything you need to know about our clients and our field so you can excel at your job.  We can teach anyone with a good attitude who is self-motivated for more.  These are things you must demonstrate in the interview process. 



The working hours? 

As I stated before, our company is based in Texas, so we require you to work during US business hours, preferably 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST (with an hour off for lunch) or 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST.  There is some flexibility here, but you would interact with us during business hours and follow up with U.S. companies and families living in the Central Standard Time zone.



What about pay?

We are serious about hiring someone and are looking to fill this position ASAP.  I also want this to be a real job that can meet your financial needs.  We pay your 13th month pay, bonuses, annual pay increases, etc. 



What about the 13th Month? 

Do we pay the 13th month?  Of course, we do.  It’s part of Filipino culture, and we want to be a part of it too. We pay half of the 13th month in the 3rd quarter for school supplies, etc., for your kids (or whatever else you choose) and the other half right before Christmas. 



What happens next? 

Since our jobs are so popular, we generally get deluged with applicants.  So, I have designed a multi-part interview process to make the process simple and efficient for all parties.  



The first part of the interview process is designed to examine your English-speaking & writing skills, personality type, internet speed, and ability to follow directions. Please be advised that those who submit incomplete applications will be ignored.



If you make it through this first round, we will talk via video chat to answer any questions and get to know you better. 



We will then ultimately hire someone, potentially you!!!



How to Apply: 

To submit your application for the job, please complete all of the following and
 them to us at 
 Please complete this quick assessment, as it will be our primary initial qualification: 

* Video yourself looking at the camera and explain why you would be a good fit for this position. Then, send me a link to see your video. 

* Perform an Internet speed test at 
, send a screenshot of your results, and include them in your
 with the video.

* Along with your resume, send us the names of at least 3 references we can contact who would say good things about working with you.  This could be a priest, former employer, bank manager, school teacher, or anyone.  No more than 1 of these people can be a family member.

title: YouTube Video Editor – Add Light Commentary to Pet Compilation Videos
description:
We run a growing YouTube channel focused on pets (dogs, cats, horses, and other animals). We produce two types of videos:



• educational pet behavior videos

• funny pet compilation videos



We are looking for a video editor who can add light commentary narration to our compilation videos to give them a storytelling feel.   This is not heavy editing work. The videos are already assembled. Your job is to add short narration segments that frame the clips with humor or observation.



Think of it like a funny nature documentary style voiceover.



Example style:



Instead of describing what happens in the clip:



? “This dog steals food.”



We want commentary like:



? “This dog has been studying the kitchen counter for weeks, waiting for his time.”



The goal is to add personality and commentary that makes the video feel creator-driven rather than just a compilation of clips.



Responsibilities



• Add short narration lines throughout compilation videos

• Insert narration audio at appropriate 
nts between clips

• Lower background music slightly under narration

• Maintain natural pacing and timing

• Export final YouTube-ready video



Most videos are 9+ minutes long.



Narration will typically total about 70–90 seconds per video.



Tools



Editors may use:



• Adobe Premiere

• Final Cut

• CapCut

• DaVinci Resolve

• or similar



AI voice tools will be used, but voice must sound very natural and not robotic.



What We’re Looking For



Someone who:



• has good editing timing

• understands humor and pacing

• can write short commentary lines

• speaks fluent English

• can follow simple instructions



Experience with YouTube content editing is a plus.



Experience with pet or animal videos is also a plus.



Compensation



We will start with a paid test project.



If the test goes well, this can turn into ongoing work editing multiple videos per week.



Our biggest issue is finding people who will actually follow the instructions. Hopefully, you will be able to do that. 

This is a big warning, right in the middle of the job description. I hope that you see it and heed it. 

Please follow the instructions if you are seriously interested. I don't like discarding good applicants because they can't follow simple directions, but since following instructions is a part of the job... if you can't follow directions in the job application process, that is a good indicator. 



TO APPLY:



Please include:



1. Links to YouTube videos you have edited



2. A short note about your editing experience



3. Your approximate turnaround time to create and add approximately 60 to 90 seconds of commentary to a 9 to 10 minute compilation video. 



3. Write a humorous commentary line for a dog sneaking the entire pizza box with half the pizza left in it...out the back door and into his dog house in the backyard when no one is watching.



4. The word “Goose” in your application so we know you read the entire job description.



I'm looking forward to seeing your application materials.

Thanks!

/Instagram (this is non-negotiable — send examples)

title: Video Editor Needed - $800 TO $1200 per Month
description:
We are hiring a highly capable video editor who is experienced with both traditional editing and modern AI video tools.



This is not an entry-level position. We need someone fast, creative, and independent.



What We Need



You must have experience using AI video tools such as VEO3, Sora, Eleven Labs, and other generative AI software.



You must be able to craft strong edits from broad creative direction. We will not always give step-by-step instructions. You should be able to take an idea and turn it into a finished, engaging video.



You must be able to source footage from the internet when needed, work with footage we provide, and generate additional AI footage when necessary.



You must be experienced editing in multiple styles, including YouTube long-form videos, YouTube Shorts, UGC-style ads,
 ads, TikTok-style edits, and cinematic edits.



You must be able and willing to handle between 10 and 25 videos per week.



Compensation



Pay is $10 to $15 per completed edit depending on experience and skill level.



There will be consistent weekly workload and opportunity for long-term work if performance is strong.



Ideal Candidate



Understands pacing, retention, strong hooks, and engagement.



Can follow direction but also think creatively.



Works fast without sacrificing quality.



Understands modern internet culture and short-form trends.



Fluent in English.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Your portfolio (YouTube, TikTok, ads, etc.).



Examples of AI-generated footage you have created.



What editing software you use.



Your average turnaround time per video.



Your weekly availability.



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone experienced with AI video editing who can handle high output and grow with us long-term.

title: General Manager / Business Manager
description:
Do you know a specific business inside and out? Let’s build a new company together.



I’m a US-based entrepreneur investing in new ventures. My team handles all technology, marketing, and operational execution. What we need is someone who understands the inner mechanics of a specific business model at a deep, operational level: suppliers, logistics, fulfillment flows, margins, customer expectations, and all the real-world details that make the operation succeed.



I’m looking for someone with intimate, firsthand knowledge of a particular business or industry. You’ll map out exactly how that business works, point us to the right suppliers, and then run the business full time once we launch.



This is not a VA role. This is a leadership role for someone who knows a business from the inside.



What You’ll Do

 - Explain exactly how the business you know operates from end to end

- Identify the correct suppliers, vendors, and fulfillment partners

- Break down the logistics, workflows, margins, and common bottlenecks

- Build the operational blueprint: SOPs, pricing logic, vendor flow, service delivery steps

- Validate and refine the business model before capital is deployed

- Step in as the full-time operator, general manager, or business lead once we launch

- Guide the business while my team executes tech, marketing, and day-to-day operations



What I’m Looking For

- Intimate, real-world experience inside a specific business or industry

- Detailed understanding of suppliers, logistics, fulfillment, pricing, and operations

- Ability to articulate a business clearly enough for us to build and scale it



Compensation & Growth

- Very competitive salary

- Performance bonuses up to $10,000/year

- Full-time role after we begin building the business

- You become the core operator of the business you help design



How to Apply



In your application, include:



- The exact business model you know extremely well

- The website of the business you believe we should replicate or build (required)

- The suppliers, logistics, and workflows you have firsthand experience with

- One specific operational challenge you solved and how you solved it

- Your desired monthly salary (USD)



Only apply if you can provide industry-level insight into a real business. We need someone with hands-on knowledge who can guide us to the right suppliers, define the operational foundation, and then run the company.
