title: Construction VA
description:
Outcomes (what success looks like)

*Coverage: ? 95% of trade packages receive 3+ qualified bids (stretch: 4+).

*On-time bids: ? 90% of bids received by the deadline.

*Quality: 100% of bids aligned to standardized scope sheets; ? 5% post-award scope gaps.

*Prequal health: ? 90% of active bidders current on COI, W-9, safety EMR, bonding, capacity.

*Speed: ITB-to-bid cycle ? 10 business days (typical interiors) / ? 15 (ground-up).

*Diversity & reach: Maintain an active, rated bench of 8–12 qualified subs per key trade; track W/MBE participation where applicable.

*Partner experience: ? 8/10 trade partner satisfaction (post-bid quick pulse).





Responsibilities



Market & bench building

*Build and continuously expand TriArc’s qualified trade partner database by trade, geography, capacity, and performance.

*Run ongoing prequalification (financials, safety, workload, bonding) in coordination with Accounting.



Bid strategy & scheduling

*Publish the rolling Bid Calendar; align milestones with Estimators/PMs and owners/architects.

*Break down drawings/specs into clear trade packages; assign scope sheets and alternates.



ITB execution

*Prepare Invitation to Bid packages (drawings, specs, addenda, bid forms, alternates, due dates, delivery method).

*Post to BuildingConnected; segment targeted lists; personalize top-tier outreach.



Relentless follow-up

*3-touch cadence (Day 1
 + Day 3 call/text + Day 5 confirmation) and pre-deadline “nudge” to secure commitments.

*Track interest/no-bid reasons; backfill gaps early; escalate risk areas to Estimating.



Bid intake & leveling

*Receive bids, confirm inclusions/exclusions, and level against scope sheets; flag outliers and VE options.

*Package a clean Bid Leveling Matrix for Estimators/PMs with award recommendation.



Data & feedback loops

*Score and rate trade partner performance post-award (price accuracy, quality, safety, schedule).

*Run post-bid debriefs; capture lessons learned to refine future ITBs.



Brand & relationship

*Be TriArc’s front door for subs: fast answers, fair process, respectful communication, and values-based partnership.





Required Traits & Skills

*Excellent Communication Skills

*Hunter mentality: proactive, persistent, upbeat on the phone; comfortable making 30–50 quality contacts/day in peak cycles.

*Construction fluency: understands typical scopes (CSI divisions), alternates, addenda, and gaps that derail bids.

*Process discipline: lives in checklists, documents everything.

*Communication: crisp writing, professional phone presence, tact with hard-bid deadlines.

*Values fit: Do what you say • Do the right thing • Gumption • Stick-to-itiveness • Passion/Enthusiasm.



Nice-to-Have

*Customer Service / Appointment Setting experience

*GC pre-con/bid desk experience or supplier/manufacturer rep background.

*Existing DFW sub network across interiors, ground-up flex/industrial, retail shells.



Key KPIs & Scorecard (reported weekly)

*% trade packages with 3+ bids (primary KPI)

*Avg. bids per trade

*% bids on time

*coverage gaps prevented (and when caught)

*Prequal completion rate / expirations cured

*Diversity/bench depth by top 15 trades

*ITB?Bid cycle time

*Trade partner satisfaction pulse



Sample Weekly Cadence

*Mon: Publish bid calendar; align with Estimators; identify coverage risks.

*Tue–Thu: ITB sends, follow-ups, phone blocks, addendum broadcasts, pre-deadline confirmations.

*Fri: Deliver leveled bid matrices; update KPIs; partner thank-you touchpoints.



Technical Requirements:

*Computer: Intel i5 processor or equivalent with at least 8GB RAM

*Internet: Minimum 50 MBPS download speed

*Dual Monitor is required

*Noise cancellation headset

*HD Cam (Clutter Free, Ideally Plain Well-lit background)



Job Details:

*Job Type: Part-time

*Schedule: TBA

*Salary Range: PHP 20,000 – 33,000 monthly, depending on experience.



Application Instruction:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagO7KL90nGSfhiE9/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: JOB POST #2 — SOURCER VA (KeHE + NEW SUPPLIERS)
description:
Overview

We’re building a proof-based Amazon Wholesale operation. You will do two things at a high level:



Scrape and analyze KeHE inventory sheets to extract profitable SKUs quickly and accurately



Find and qualify additional wholesale suppliers/distributors to expand beyond KeHE over time



This is not general VA work. We need someone who can move fast, provide evidence, and produce clean outputs.



Core Responsibilities

A) KeHE Sheet Scraping + SKU Validation (Primary)



Scrape/import KeHE inventory spreadsheets (catalog/deal files) into our template



Clean, filter, and identify high-probability SKUs



Build “Proof Packs” for each SKU with:



Keepa screenshots (90d + 365d: price, rank trend, offer count)



Fee/profit tool screenshot (SellerAmp/RevSeller/Helium10 profit calc)



Restriction/gating check proof (Seller Central eligibility screenshot)



1–2 line risk note (meltable/temp, expiration, hazmat, IP, price volatility)



B) New Supplier / Distributor Sourcing (Secondary)



Identify legitimate distributors and brand-direct supplier opportunities



Build a supplier pipeline list with:



Company name + website



Contact name +
 + phone (if available)



Minimum order requirements (MOQ)



Ordering method (portal vs rep)



Product categories carried



Any notes on authorization / invoices / compliance



Required Deliverables



A clean Google Sheet with:



SKU leads + profitability metrics + proof links



Supplier pipeline tracker with qualification notes



Organized proof pack folders linked to each SKU (labeled clearly)



Non-Negotiable Requirements



2+ years hands-on Amazon Wholesale/OA/FBA experience



Daily use of Keepa + a fee tool (SellerAmp/RevSeller or similar)



Strong Google Sheets/Excel (filters + formulas; pivot tables preferred)



Can scrape/clean spreadsheets fast and accurately (no missing fields)



Clear written English and professional reporting



Philippines-based only



Availability: 10–20 hrs/week to start



Compensation



Paid trial week with scorecard



$2.00–$2.50/hr to start (based on performance and accuracy)



Weekly payments via Wise / Payoneer / PayPal



Hours and rate increase after consistent output



Paid Trial (Required)



In a 3–4 hour trial, deliver:



KeHE Sheet Scrape Test:



Take a provided KeHE spreadsheet and extract 15–20 viable SKUs into our template



Include full proof packs for each SKU (Keepa + fees + eligibility)



Supplier Sourcing Test:



Provide 10 qualified supplier leads (legit distributors/brand-direct) with contact details and key terms (MOQ, categories, ordering method)



Must meet ?95?curacy (math + proof + formatting).



How to Apply (Must Answer All)



Reply with:



Confirm you are applying for Sourcer VA (KeHE Scraping + New Suppliers)



Hourly rate expectation



Tools you actively use (Keepa, SellerAmp, RevSeller, Helium10, JungleScout, etc.)



Describe your sourcing process in bullets:



How you scrape sheets



How you validate SKUs



How you find/qualify suppliers



Quick test (show your work):



Wholesale cost: $2.74



Promo discount: 17%



Amazon price: $8.99

a) Post-promo cost per unit?

b) Gross margin % (ignore Amazon fees)?

c) One specific wholesale/FBA risk to check before buying?



2–3 time slots for a 20–30 min call (EST)



Thank you,

Travon Epps

Aspen Global Strategies

Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time position (Monday–Friday, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Commercial Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Lead Gen, CRM, Marketing & Admin Support)
description:
We are seeking a Commercial Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support lead generation, CRM management, outreach, deal support, and marketing tasks for a commercial real estate professional. The successful candidate will assist with prospecting, pipeline tracking, client coordination, and ongoing admin and marketing support. This role requires strong English communication skills, attention to detail, excellent organization, and the ability to manage multiple ongoing responsibilities in a fast-paced real estate environment.



Key Responsibilities:

• Research potential commercial real estate clients (builders, developers, investors, businesses)

• Build and maintain targeted lead lists

• Find and verify decision-makers’ contact details

• Qualify and segment leads by industry, location, and deal size

• Update, clean, and manage lead and CRM databases

• Source leads from LinkedIn, databases, and websites

• Track lead sources and monitor inbound leads

• Prepare daily and weekly lead and pipeline reports

• Send cold
s and LinkedIn outreach messages

• Manage follow-up sequences and appointment booking

• Pre-qualify prospects before discovery calls

• Send calendar invites, confirm, reschedule, or cancel meetings

• Track outreach performance and response rates

• Update CRM records and move deals through pipeline stages

• Set follow-up reminders and flag high-priority leads

• Upload call notes and track deal progress

• Prepare proposals, quotes, and customized proposal templates

• Track proposal status and follow up with prospects

• Coordinate contract signing and collect required client documents

• Assist with onboarding new clients and handovers to operations

• Manage LinkedIn presence and maintain professional brand tone

• Post approved social media content and respond to comments/messages

• Collect testimonials, reviews, and case studies

• Track engagement metrics and campaign performance

• Support marketing campaigns and launches

• Maintain organized records and ensure tasks meet deadlines



Qualifications:

• Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, preferably in real estate or commercial real estate

• Strong lead generation, CRM, and database management experience

• Comfortable handling outreach, follow-ups, and appointment scheduling

• Experience with LinkedIn prospecting and
 outreach tools

• Familiarity with CRM platforms and pipeline tracking

• Proficient in basic marketing tools (Canva and social media platforms are a plus)

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven

• Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently



What You’ll Get:

• Fixed monthly salary (to be discussed)

 • Paid Australian public holidays

 • Bi-weekly pay

 • Long-term opportunity working with one primary agent

 • Supportive and professional team environment

 • No graveyard shifts



How to Apply:

Do not reply to this post.

Job Code: CREVA

Apply directly through this link: 



**Incomplete applications or those not following instructions will not be reviewed.

**Due to the volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Executive Assistant/Graphic Design Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant & Graphic Designer to support executive leadership while also creating high-quality visual and branded content. This hybrid role is ideal for a detail-oriented professional who excels at executive support and is comfortable using Canva or similar content creation tools to quickly produce polished, on-brand materials for internal and external use.

The role requires discretion, excellent communication, strong time management, and the

ability to move fluidly between administrative execution and creative production.

Key Responsibilities – Executive Assistant

- Provide direct administrative and operational support to executive leadership

- Manage calendars, scheduling, travel arrangements, and meeting coordination

- Prepare agendas, executive correspondence, reports, and presentations

- Track action items, deadlines, and priorities to ensure follow-through

- Serve as a liaison between executives and internal/external stakeholders

- Assist with project coordination, vendor communications, and confidential matters

- Anticipate executive needs and proactively address issues

Key Responsibilities – Graphic Design & Content Creation

- Create visually compelling content using Canva or similar design platforms, as well as Adobe Creative Suite or Figma when needed

- Design branded materials including presentations, one-pagers, social media graphics, flyers, brochures, digital ads, and internal communications

- Maintain and apply brand standards consistently across all materials

- Collaborate with leadership and marketing teams to translate ideas into clear, engaging visual assets

- Manage multiple design requests and revisions efficiently

- Prepare final assets for print and digital distribution

Required Qualifications

- Experience in an Executive Assistant, Administrative Assistant, Graphic Designer, or hybrid role

- Proficiency with Canva or comparable content creation tools (Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, etc.)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities

- High level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality

- Strong attention to detail and visual design aesthetics

- Ability to work independently, take initiative, and adapt in a fast-paced environment

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience supporting C-suite or senior executives

- Background in healthcare, wellness, professional services, or entrepreneurial environments

- Familiarity with social media and digital marketing design best practices

- Experience with project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, Trello, Monday, etc.)

- Experience creating executive-level presentations and branded templates

Key Competencies

- Executive presence and professionalism

- Creative problem-solving and visual storytelling

- Time management and prioritization

- Adaptability and flexibility

- Strong interpersonal and collaboration skills

Work Environment & Expectations

- Fast-paced, dynamic environment

- Hybrid or remote options may be available depending on location

- Requires flexibility, responsiveness, and a proactive mindset

title: Creative Editor | starting at $1,000/month | E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a Creative Editor who is eager to learn and help create high-performing creative assets for
 ads.



The role mainly involves creating and editing images that will be used in advertising campaigns. You will follow a structured system, receive clear instructions and go through a thorough training program from A–Z.



This position is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, visually creative, willing to learn, comfortable working with AI tools and image editing software, and interested in how marketing connects with human psychology.



** Responsibilities **

- Create and edit image creatives for
 ads

- Turn concepts into clean, native-style ad visuals

- Use AI tools to help generate creative ideas and content

- Follow step-by-step instructions to produce ad creatives

- Organize creative assets and files



** Requirements **

- Experience with image editing tools (such as Canva or similar tools)

- Experience using AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude

- Familiarity with Google Gemini is a plus

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to follow structured processes

- Good English reading and writing skills



** Compensation & Benefits **

- $1,000 monthly salary (starting)

- Performance-based bonus opportunities

- Paid training (all time spent during the training period will be paid)

- Paid AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Higgsfield etc.)



** Growth Opportunities **

We are building a long-term team and strong performers will have opportunities to grow into senior roles within the company.



Senior tea
mbers receive additional benefits such as:

- Paid vacation leave

- Healthcare card / HMO coverage (commonly used in the Philippines for private healthcare)

- Salary raise and performance bonuses



** Work Setup **

- Remote position

- Flexible working hours

- Long-term opportunity. If you’ve read this far include the secret word "Level 2" in the title of your application. Skipping it means automatic disqualification.



** How to Apply **

Send us your updated resume and a short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit. In your video, please also answer these questions:



*Have you created image ads or video ads before?

*Have you worked with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) before especially for e-commerce?

*What’s your experience with dropshipping or e-commerce ads?

*Why do you consider yourself an A-player as a creative editor?

*What markets/countries have you worked with?

*Do you currently have other clients? If so, how many hours per week do they take?

*What are you looking in this role?



Looking forward to meeting you!



P.S. Only serious talents allowed. We’re looking for the best of the best.

title: Airbnb Property Research
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Airbnb Virtual Assistant to help us identify profitable short-term rental opportunities and build a pipeline of properties we can secure for our Airbnb business. Your primary responsibility will be using tools like AirDNA, Zillow, and other market research platforms to find high-performing markets and specific properties that meet our investment criteria—then contacting landlords/property managers to start conversations and move deals forward.



This role is ideal for someone who understands Airbnb fundamentals, can confidently talk to landlords, and is highly organized with lead tracking and follow-up.



Key responsibilities



Market & deal research



Use AirDNA to evaluate market demand, ADR, occupancy, seasonality, revenue projections, comps, and regulations (where applicable).



Use Zillow (and similar platforms) to find properties that match our buy box (budget, bedrooms, layout, location, amenities).



Cross-check deals using additional tools (e.g., Google Maps, local STR rules sites, Mashvisor/Rabbu/PriceLabs comps when needed, etc.).



Lead generation & outreach



Identify landlord/agent contact information and call landlords to introduce our rental model and gauge willingness.



Handle initial objections professionally and collect key information (lease terms, fees, pet policies, furnished/unfurnished, HOA rules, etc.).



Schedule follow-ups and keep leads warm.



Pipeline management



Maintain a clean lead tracker (Google Sheets/CRM) with notes, call outcomes, next steps, and documents.



Provide weekly reporting: number of leads sourced, qualified, contacted, responses, follow-ups, and deals in progress.



Minimum requirements (must-have)



2+ years of experience as a VA or specialist in Airbnb/short-term rental research, real estate lead gen, or arbitrage sourcing



Proven ability to use AirDNA and Zillow for profitability analysis and deal sourcing



Comfortable making phone calls to landlords/property managers (strong spoken English)



Strong organization skills, follow-up discipline, and attention to detail



Reliable internet + quiet place to take calls

title: CFO Support Accountant (Accrual-Focused)
description:
Read Carefully Before Applying



Working hours are non-negotiable.



You must be available Monday–Friday through 2:00 PM Pacific / 5:00 PM Eastern.



Applications without a resume link will not be reviewed.



This role requires real accrual-based accounting experience.



If your background is primarily cash-basis bookkeeping or transaction categorization without understanding balance sheet flow, this role is not a fit.



Non-Negotiable Requirements



You must already have hands-on experience with:



QuickBooks Online (daily use)

Accrual-based accounting, applied not theoretical

Maintaining and explaining a clean balance sheet

Payroll journal entries including wages, taxes, and accruals

Monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Clear understanding of COGS vs operating expenses

Supporting multiple clients in a bookkeeping firm, CPA firm, or similar

At least 5 years of accounting or bookkeeping experience

Excellent, stable internet connection



If any of the above are missing, please do not apply.



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm supporting service-based businesses.



This is a tactical, detail-focused accounting role that supports CFO review and decision-making. Accuracy matters more than speed. This is not a training position.



This is a full-time, long-term role.



Core Responsibilities:

Maintain clean, accrual-based books in QuickBooks Online

Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations

Record and review payroll journal entries

Ensure proper classification between COGS and operating expenses

Maintain a clean and consistent chart of accounts

Proactively flag anomalies or unclear transactions

Prepare reliable financials for CFO review

Support month-end close and assigned client deadlines

Maintain client SOPs 



Required Skills:



Strong QuickBooks Online experience

Deep understanding of accrual accounting and balance sheet flow

Able to explain how and why transactions are recorded

High attention to detail and follow-through

Clear written and verbal English communication

Comfortable following structure while thinking independently



Work Schedule and Requirements



Full-time, Monday–Friday

Must be available through 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET

Reliable high-speed internet, verified during onboarding

Quiet, professional home office

Strong responsiveness during working hours



How to Apply



To be considered, submit:



A resume link using Google Drive or Dropbox

Written confirmation that you can consistently work through 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET



Applications missing either item will not be reviewed.

title: Billing Specialist-BUSY Pediatric Therapy Company
description: The Billing Specialist is responsible for managing insurance billing and payment processes to ensure accurate and timely reimbursement for therapy services. This role includes submitting claims, verifying insurance benefits, tracking authorizations, following up on unpaid or denied claims, and communicating with insurance companies and families regarding billing questions. The Billing Specialist works closely with the clinical and administrative teams to maintain accurate records, support compliance, and ensure efficient revenue cycle management for the clinic.

title: Senior Paid Media Specialist (Full Funnel / Closed Loop Marketer)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Paid Media Specialist who understands that ads don’t stop at the click.



We’re searching for someone who goes beyond CPCs and CTRs and knows how to optimise campaigns based on pipeline, sales outcomes, and revenue attribution.



This role is for a full-funnel marketer who understands how paid media connects with CRM systems, sales teams, and marketing automation to generate qualified opportunities not just leads.



You’ll be responsible for managing and scaling campaigns across Google, Meta and LinkedIn for a portfolio of growth-focused clients.



If you enjoy diving deep into CRM data, attribution, conversion tracking and lead quality, this role will suit you perfectly.



What You’ll Do



Manage and scale paid campaigns across Google Ads, Meta & LinkedIn for a portfolio of service-based and B2B clients.



Take full ownership of campaign performance from first click through to closed revenue.



You will:



• Manage 8–12 client accounts with budgets ranging from $1k – $40k/month

• Optimise campaigns based on lead quality, pipeline and revenue outcomes

• Connect paid media with CRM systems such as HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Podium and Lana

• Analyse sales pipeline data to improve lead-to-opportunity and opportunity-to-sale conversion rates

• Implement closed-loop attribution to understand true campaign ROI

• Build high-quality Looker Studio reports with insights, commentary and strategic recommendations

• Run structured testing across audiences, creative, offers and landing pages

• Work closely with our strategy and creative teams to improve funnel performance

• Continuously improve CPA, CPL, SQL rate and ROAS



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers and understanding what actually drives revenue.



What We’re Looking For



This role requires someone who understands performance marketing at a commercial level, not just platform management.



You should have:



• 5+ years hands-on experience running Google Ads and Meta campaigns

• Strong experience in lead generation marketing for service-based businesses

• Experience connecting paid media with CRM platforms (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Podium, Lana or similar)

• Experience analysing lead quality and sales pipeline data

• Advanced reporting skills using Looker Studio, GA4 and Google Sheets

• Strong understanding of conversion tracking, attribution and GTM

• Experience running B2B campaigns on LinkedIn Ads

• Ability to identify insights and translate them into strategic optimisation opportunities



Most importantly, you should care about revenue outcomes, not just platfor
trics.



What Makes Someone Successful in This Role



The ideal candidate:



• Thinks like a growth marketer, not just a media buyer

• Enjoys analysing CRM data and sales outcomes

• Understands how marketing and sales work together

• Can clearly explain what’s working, what’s not, and what to do next

• Is proactive with ideas and testing



What’s In It For You



• Competitive remuneration

• Flexible 2–3 day per week role

• Work with an award-winning digital agency

• Autonomy to test ideas and influence strategy

• Opportunity to grow into a senior performance or strategy role



Hiring Process



Intro call

Short paid practical exercise

Final interview



This role will suit someone who enjoys working at the intersection of paid media, CRM data and revenue analytics.

title: Advanced Video Editor for Corporate Storytelling
description:
We are a creative agency specializing in the construction industry and public charter school marketing. We are seeking a highly skilled advanced video editor. In this role, you will create corporate videos for our company’s own social media, as well as for select clients. Your content will include job site progressions, testimonials, and ads for both our brand and other customers. You will also produce content to boost our internal social media presence, including ads, monthly content calendars, and copywriting. At the same time, you’ll produce flashy, high-motion After Effects sequences to captivate audiences.



Key Responsibilities:

Edit corporate videos (testimonials, job site progress, ground-up builds).

Produce short-form ads for our internal social media and select clients.

Design long-form branded content and flashy After Effects motion graphics.

title: Vendor & Turnover Coordinator

We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Vendor & Turnover Coordinator who can ensure every property is guest-ready, vendors are accountable, and operational issues are caught before guests arrive.

?? This is a high-ownership operations role where attention to detail and proactive thinking are essential.

Escalate problems quickly and coordinate solutions

Maintain strong communication with cleaning teams

Track work completion and verify quality

Ensure vendors meet deadlines and service standards



Quality Control

Create and refine checklists to ensure everything's covered



???? Ideal Candidate

We’re looking for someone who is:

? Extremely detail-oriented

? Proactive and resourceful when solving problems

? Comfortable holding vendors accountable professionally

? Highly organized with strong follow-through

? Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new apps

? Reliable and responsive

Vendor or contractor coordination experience

Task tracking systems

Properties are consistently guest-ready with zero issues

Issues are caught before guests notice them

Operations run smoothly and efficiently

- short introduction about yourself

???? Why Join Us

Work with a fast-growing hospitality company

High ownership and trust

Opportunity to grow with the operations team

Remote work flexibility

title: Intake Specialist-BUSY Pediatric Therapy Office
description: The Intake Specialist is responsible for managing the referral, intake, and onboarding process for new families. This role includes receiving and tracking referrals, communicating with families to gather required information, verifying insurance coverage, obtaining prior authorizations for services, coordinating evaluation scheduling, and ensuring all required intake documentation is completed and uploaded to the patient chart. The Intake Specialist also maintains intake reporting by tracking referral sources, monitoring new inquiries, managing waitlists, and providing regular reports on referral trends and scheduling outcomes. This position works closely with clinical, scheduling, and billing teams to ensure a smooth, efficient, and welcoming start to services for each family.

title: Telecommunications Tech ****YOU MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED FOR A POSITION****
description:
We are a leading telecommunications solutions provider dedicated to delivering cutting-edge communication technologies to businesses of all sizes. We pride ourselves on providing exceptional service and innovative solutions to our clients, and we are looking for a talented Telecommunications Phone System Technician to join our team.



Position Overview:

As a Telecommunications Phone System Technician, you will play a crucial role in designing, implementing, and maintaining telecommunications systems for our clients. We are seeking an experienced technician with a strong background in legacy systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC, as well as expertise in modern UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) solutions and VoIP phone systems such as RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.



Responsibilities:



Install, configure, and maintain legacy phone systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC.

Design and implement UCaaS solutions to meet client requirements.

Configure and troubleshoot VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Perform system upgrades, patches, and maintenance tasks.

Provide technical support and assistance to clients, both remotely and on-site.

Collaborate with clients to understand their telecommunication needs and recommend solutions.

Assist in the training of end-users on telecommunication systems.

Keep up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies in telecommunications.

Qualifications:



Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in telecommunications.

Proficiency in legacy phone systems such as Nortel, Avaya, and NEC EC.

Strong knowledge of UCaaS solutions and VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Previous experience with 8x8, RingCentral, Nextiva, or Dialpad is a strong plus.

Industry certifications (e.g., CCNA, CCNP, UCaaS certifications) are a bonus.



Why Join?



Competitive salary and benefits package.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Exposure to cutting-edge telecommunications technologies.

Chance to work with a diverse range of clients and industries.

Employee recognition and appreciation programs.

If you are a dedicated Telecommunications Phone System Technician with experience in legacy systems and modern UCaaS/VoIP solutions, we encourage you to apply. Join our team and help us shape the future of business communication.

title: Publishing & Book Formatting
description:
Provide end-to-end formatting and submission support for a 23,000-word manuscript intended for self-publishing (Amazon KDP or similar print-on-demand platform). The objective is to produce a clean, professional, print-ready book interior and properly formatted cover files.



Responsibilities



- Manuscript Preparation

    - Convert manuscript from Apple Pages to Microsoft Word (or appropriate publishing-compatible format).

    - Clean formatting inconsistencies (spacing, paragraph breaks, font uniformity).

    - Confirm manuscript is finalized prior to formatting work.

- Interior Book Formatting

- Set appropriate trim size (likely 6x9 unless otherwise specified).

- Configure proper margins and gutter spacing for print.

- Apply consistent:

    - Chapter headings

    - Body font and size

    - Paragraph spacing

    - Page breaks

- Insert page numbers (excluding front matter as appropriate).

- Format basic front matter:

    - Title page

    - Copyright page (template guidance only)

- Export print-ready interior PDF that passes platform validation.

- Cover Formatting

- Calculate spine width based on final page count using platform calculator.

- Format front, back, and spine layout using existing cover artwork.

- Ensure correct bleed and dimension specifications.

- Export full print-ready cover PDF.

- Platform Submission Support

- Assist client in setting up Amazon KDP (or selected platform).

- Upload formatted interior and cover files.

- Ensure files pass platform checks and validation.

- Guide client through proof copy process if requested.

- Client Support

- Communicate primarily via
.

- Provide light recommendations where appropriate (e.g., trim size standards, font readability).

- Offer guidance to first-time author throughout submission process.



Requirements



- Experience formatting books for Amazon KDP, Lulu, or similar platforms.

- Strong understanding of print specifications (trim size, margins, bleed, spine width).

- High attention to detail and formatting consistency.

- Ability to guide first-time authors with clarity and patience.

- Strong written communication skills.



Hours & Schedule



- Project-based to start (estimated 10–20 hours per book depending on manuscript condition and platform requirements)

- Flexible schedule, with turnaround timelines to be confirmed based on project needs. 

- Potential for recurring engagement as additional books enter production.



Interested? Please apply on this link: 
.com/wellaware-apply

title: Candidate Resourcer
description:
Candidate Manager / Recruitment Resource



About Talent Success



Talent Success is a workforce solutions provider delivering recruitment, labour hire, workforce training, and skilled migration advisory services to Australian businesses. We support industries including construction, trades, manufacturing, logistics, FMCG, retail, and commercial sectors, helping companies secure reliable, skilled talent.



We are currently seeking a Candidate Manager / Recruitment Resource to support our recruitment team by sourcing, screening, and managing candidates throughout the recruitment process.



Role Overview



The Candidate Manager / Recruitment Resource plays a key role in identifying and engaging high-quality candidates to support our clients’ workforce needs. You will work closely with the sales and recruitment team to build strong talent pipelines and ensure candidates are job-ready and compliant.



Key Responsibilities

Candidate Sourcing



Source candidates using platforms such as Indeed, SEEK, LinkedIn, job boards, and internal databases



Indeed, Smart Sourcing, and database searches to identify suitable candidates



Build and maintain talent pools across key industries



Candidate Screening

Maintain regular contact with candidates throughout the recruitment process



Ensure candidates have required licenses, tickets, and work rights



Prepare candidate profiles for submission to clients



Database & CRM Management



Maintain accurate candidate records in the CRM / ATS



Upload resumes, update candidate notes, and track recruitment progress



Build and manage talent pipelines for upcoming client needs



Compliance & Onboarding



Verify work rights, licenses, and industry certifications



Assist with onboarding for labor hire placements



Ensure candidates meet health, safety, and site requirements



Skills & Experience



Previous experience in recruitment resourcing, candidate management, or HR support



Strong sourcing experience using Indeed, SEEK, LinkedIn, or recruitment databases



Excellent communication and relationship-building skills



Ability to manage multiple candidates and recruitment workflows



Strong organizational and administrative skills



Experience recruiting in construction, trades, logistics, FMCG, or industrial sectors will be highly regarded.

title: Accounts Manager (Part-time remote work, earn up to USD 600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviours. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



This role is a part-time (50%), virtual role responsible for executing and coordinating the financial processes within the company including bookkeeping, running financial reports, issuing invoices, managing accounts receivable and supporting our Australia-based external company accountants. 



Responsibilities  



As Accounts Manager your responsibilities will consist of: 



-Conducting bookkeeping in XERO, ensuring all transactions for the month are reconciled by the 5th of the following month. You will also set up rules to increase efficiency and identify other opportunities to improve our use of XERO. 

-Obtaining receipts from
 for inclusion in XERO (via Missive). 

-Managing our invoicing process, from the timely and efficient issue of our invoices to our customers to ensuring invoices are paid on time. 

-Managing payroll for employees and overseeing contractor payments via Wise. 

-Supporting BAS and IAS reporting (as directed by our Australia based accountants) 

-Running monthly financial reports (P&L, cashflow) and analysing and presenting these to company leadership. 

-Running quarterly expense analysis reports, analysing these, and presenting your recommendations to optimise ongoing costs.    

-Running quarterly revenue analysis reports, identifying which products, countries, industry sectors generate the most revenue and show the most revenue growth. 



What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean that the company leadership has access to up-to-date company financials at all times, and are supported by in-depth, insightful analysis and recommendations to improve company finances and financial processes. 



The success of this role will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Monthly reconciliations are complete by the 5th of the following month 

-Monthly & Quarterly Financial Reports issued on time 

-Invoices are issued within 3 days of being marked ready-to-invoice in the Client-to-Cash process flow  

-90% of invoice value is paid within 60 days of PO receipt 

-<5% of total invoice value is overdue 

-Number of cost improvement opportunities identified 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behaviour, which means: 



-You are honest, reliable, and have a great attitude to work. You do what you say and say what you do. 

-You are highly organised, pay attention to detail, get things right the first time most of the time, but are not afraid to make a mistake and take responsibility. 

-You take initiative, can work with relatively little supervision and can manage a large diverse workload with competing priorities. You speak up when you don’t know something or don’t understand, but are proactive enough to then go and find out and learn. 

-You can work well on your own, but enjoy being part of a (virtual) team. You have no problem receiving feedback from others and acting on it. 

-You are keen to take on extra responsibilities where you can (after all you are a talented individual!) but at the same time you are happy to do simple, more administrative work where required. 

-Ultimately you are the kind of individual who can make things happen and is excited by being part of a bigger vision. 





Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Accounting Graduate 

-Xero certified advisor 

-At least 5 years of demonstrable experience with AU accounting including GST, BAS etc. 

-Proficient with online tools, platforms, and associated integrations including Stripe, HubSpot, LivePlan 

-You have the headroom and desire to grow into a more substantial financial role within the company (subject to company success and growth)  

-You are fluent in English and especially your written English is clear, concise, and accurate.     



 What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 500 and USD 600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 10 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 500 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Golden Apple” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Blog Writer (Motorcycle, Luxury Outerwear, and Beach Lifestyle)
description:
Job Title: Blog Writer (Motorcycle, Luxury Outerwear, and Beach Lifestyle)



We’re looking for a skilled blog writer to create high-quality, long-form articles for three different brands. This role requires someone who can research deeply, write clearly, and produce engaging content tailored to different audiences.



This is an ongoing part-time role with consistent weekly work.



Responsibilities



1. Write 3 blog posts per week.

2. One article will be for a motorcycle-related brand.

3. One article will be for a luxury winter coat brand.

4. One article will be for a beach / coastal lifestyle brand.

5. Each article must be between 1500 and 3000 words.

6. Conduct thorough research to ensure the content is accurate and informative.

7. Submit new blog post ideas regularly for approval before writing.

8. Adapt your writing style depending on the brand and audience.



Important Requirements



1. Absolutely no AI-generated content is allowed.

2. All writing must be 100% human-written and original.

3. Content may be checked with AI detection tools.

4. Writers who use AI will be disqualified.



Content Expectations



1. Articles must be well researched.

2. Writing must have clear structure and strong readability.

3. Content should be educational and engaging.

4. SEO awareness is important, but articles must be written naturally for readers.



Application Instructions



1. To apply, submit a trial blog post between 500 and 1000 words.

2. The topic for the trial article is: “Why Wool Coats (70% wool or higher) Are Superior to Fast Fashion Polyester Winter Coats.”

3. Start your submission by providing a short outline of 4 to 6 bullet points showing how you plan to structure the article.

4. Include at least 3 sources you used for research at the end of the article.

5. Include one paragraph explaining whether you personally own or have worn a wool coat and your experience with it.

6. To confirm that you read the entire job description carefully, include the phrase “wool beats polyester in winter performance” somewhere naturally in the article.

7. Also include the word “Albatross” somewhere in the article title.

8. Applications without the trial article will not be considered.



Compensation



This is a part-time role paying approximately $700 CAD per month for producing three blog posts per week.



We look forward to finding a writer who can consistently produce strong long-form content across multiple lifestyle niches.

description:

-Campaign structure

title: Hiring: Remote B2C Closer for High-Ticket Education Offer (AU Market)
description:
We are scaling our Data Analytics Mentorship & Bootcamp in the Australian market and need a proven closer to handle our inbound flow.



If you hate cold calling and just want to take qualified, pre-booked Zoom calls, this is for you.



The Setup:

We already have a dedicated setter team actively working the leads and booking appointments straight to your calendar. Your only focus will be showing up to the Zoom calls, guiding the prospect, and closing the deal.



The Product:

A premium Data Analytics Bootcamp and Mentorship program. It’s a highly competitive offer in the AU market because we actually guarantee a local internship for our students. It solves a massive pain point, but we need a killer closer to take the prospects over the finish line.



What you’ll be doing:



Taking 2-3 pre-qualified Zoom calls per day with warm B2C leads.



Running a consultative sales process to see if they are a fit for the mentorship.



Handling objections and closing deals on the call.



Managing your own pipeline of follow-ups for leads that don't close on the first call.





What we are looking for:

Experience: You must have a proven track record closing B2C offers on Zoom.



Niche: Prior experience selling high-ticket education, mentorships, or bootcamps is strictly required. You need to understand how to sell transformation and career outcomes.



Timezone: You must be available to take calls during Australian business hours and evenings (AEST/AEDT).



Communication: Native-level English with excellent active listening skills.



Drive: You are a self-starter who thrives on commission and high conversion rates.



How to Apply:

Send me a DM with:



A brief overview of your experience closing B2C education/mentorship offers.



Your average closing rate on Zoom calls.



Your whatsapp number

title: Wedding Film Editor (Cinematic Storytelling)
description:
Wedding Film Editor (Cinematic Storytelling)



We are a boutique wedding film studio based in Australia looking for a talented wedding film editor to join our team.

Our films focus on emotional storytelling, cinematic pacing and natural 
nts rather than fast-paced social media edits.

We are looking for someone who understands weddings and can craft a beautiful story from real 
nts.

This is ongoing work for the right editor.



What You Will Be Editing



• 5–6 minute cinematic wedding highlight films

• Story-driven edits using vows and speeches

• Multi-camera footage (Sony cinema cameras)

• Natural colour and clean audio



You will receive:



• Organised footage

• Music

• Editing guidelines

• Example films to match style



Requirements





You must:



• Have experience editing wedding highlight films

• Be skilled in Adobe Premiere Pro

• Understand emotional storytelling and pacing

• Communicate clearly in English

• Be reliable with deadlines



Pay

- $220–$260 USD per highlight film

- Each film is typically 5–6 minutes long.

- There is potential for multiple films per month for the right editor.





Turnaround

- First draft delivery:

- Within 4 weeks of receiving footage

- Two revision rounds included.



To Apply



Please send: 

- 3 wedding highlight films you edited

- Your editing software

- Your typical turnaround time





Paid Test



- Shortlisted applicants will be offered a paid test edit.

title: Personal Admin Assistant
description:
Join The Collaborative Co. — a fast-growing boutique Virtual Assistant agency supporting small businesses, solo entrepreneurs, and service providers across Australia.



We are looking for a Personal Admin Assistant to support our client. You will provide high-level administrative and operational support to an established business owner managing multiple projects and commitments. This role is suited to someone proactive, organised, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment. You will take ownership of day-to-day administration, workflow coordination, and follow-ups to ensure projects move forward smoothly without constant direction.



Key Responsibilities

- Own inbox triage and daily
 management across multiple inboxes, including drafting responses and tracking follow-ups

- Manage calendars, appointments, and scheduling using Microsoft 365 and shared calendars

- Draft professional business communications including customer updates, supplier correspondence, and internal documentation

- Track outstanding tasks, deadlines, and action items to ensure nothing is missed

- Coordinate suppliers and stakeholders, request updates, and manage bookings or appointments

- Prepare and organise documents, templates, onboarding materials, and general administrative records

- Support workflow organisation using task management systems such as Outlook Tasks or Trello

- Assist with research tasks including supplier sourcing, travel planning, and project research as required

- Provide basic social media administration support including scheduling posts and resizing content in Canva

- Proactively identify workflow improvements and support the development of structured systems



Qualifications and Skills



* Strong experience in administrative or executive support roles

* Exceptional written and spoken English with the ability to draft client-facing communications independently

* Highly organised with strong time management skills and attention to detail

* Proactive problem-solver who can take initiative within agreed boundaries

* Comfortable managing changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

* Confident using Microsoft 365 including Outlook, Teams, shared calendars, and OneDrive

* Familiarity with task management tools such as Trello or similar platforms

* Experience with Canva and basic social media scheduling is an advantage

* Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup

* Ability to work during Australian business hours



Hours: Part-time

Time blocking schedule to be discussed

Must be available during Australian business hours (Australia/Perth GMT+08:00)



Start Date:

Target start date: 3rd week of March 2026





If you believe that you are fit for this role and is interested to apply, please complete our application form here:

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Wordpress Website Developer & SEO Specialist
description:

mber to help manage, optimize, and develop websites for both our agency and client accounts. This role involves SEO implementation, website updates, and assisting with the development of new websites and landing pages.

title: Ambulance Billing Specialist – Non-Emergency Transportation (Remote)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Ambulance Billing Specialist with a strong background in Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) billing.



The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience working with Ability Network and Office Ally, and a strong understanding of the complete ambulance billing cycle, including insurance verification, prior authorization, claim submission, denial management, and follow-up with insurance payers.



This role requires someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing accounts receivable while ensuring compliance with Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial insurance billing guidelines.



Key Responsibilities



Manage the full ambulance billing cycle for non-emergency transports.



Verify patient insurance coverage and check benefits eligibility prior to billing.



Obtain prior authorization for ambulance transportation when required.



Submit electronic claims through Ability Network and Office Ally.



Review trip documentation, PCS forms, and medical necessity requirements.



Follow up with insurance companies on unpaid, rejected, or denied claims.



File appeals and resubmit corrected claims when necessary.



Work aging reports and maintain follow-up on outstanding accounts.



Communicate with payers and document all billing activities accurately.



Ensure compliance with Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial payer guidelines.



Minimum Qualifications



Minimum 2 years of experience in ambulance billing (required).



Strong knowledge of Non-Emergency Ambulance Transportation billing.



Experience using Ability Network and Office Ally.



Knowledge of:



Insurance verification



Prior authorization processes



Medicare ambulance billing guidelines



Medical necessity documentation



Experience in denial management and claim follow-up.



Strong organizational and communication skills.



Fluent in English (written and verbal).



Ability to work independently in a remote environment.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience billing Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial insurance for ambulance services.



Knowledge of ambulance HCPCS codes (A-codes).



Experience with SNF consolidated billing issues.



Experience with dialysis and recurring ambulance transports.

title: E-Commerce Specialist
description:
In this role, you will be responsible for managing and optimizing product listings on Walmart, Shopify, and Ebay to drive sales growth. You will monitor and analyze sales performance across all platforms, adjust strategies as needed, and handle inventory management and fulfillment processes. You will be working 40 hours per week during American business hours and will be paid weekly.



Responsibilities:



- Create and optimize client’s online product listings on Walmart, eBay, & Shopify

- Develop attractive product descriptions tailored to each platform.

- Update pricing information and run promotions across all listings.

- Process and track all customer orders efficiently.

- Review and refresh product categories to enhance visibility.

- Manage shipping and order tracking for timely deliveries.

- Process returns, exchanges, and refunds in accordance with platform policies.

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, chats, social media, text, and calls.

- Manage product inventory and restocking needs across all platforms.

- Conduct competitor research and identify best practices for each marketplace.

- Research and source new products and design suitable for Walmart and other platforms.

- Provide full admin and back-office support to ensure smooth operations.

- Identify new product opportunities and trends in the e-commerce landscape.





Qualification & Experience Requirements:



- Fluent in American English, written and oral.

- Proven experience in managing listings on Amazon and eBay is required; experience with Walmart is highly preferred

- Experience in handling perfume products is a plus

- 2+ years of experience working in an e-commerce role.

- Demonstrated ability to create attractive product listings that drive conversions.

- Hands-on experience in dealing with customer inquiries and complaints effectively.

title: Bookkeeping  Assistant - Real Estate
description:
Slumber Stay is a Chicago-based short term hospitality real estate investment firm that operates short term rental apartments across the United States. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and spread across Chicago and the Philippines. We get things done.



We are looking for a sharp, organized Bookkeping Assistant to join our Philippines-based team. You will work closely with our bookkeepers and report to our CFO to keep the financial and operational engine of the business running smoothly.



This is a hands-on execution role. You are not here to manage strategy — you are here to make sure the details are handled correctly, on time, every time. If you take pride in clean books, clear follow-ups, and well-formatted reports, and you want to grow inside a short term rental real estate firm that is actively expanding — this role is for you.



• 2–3 years of experience in bookkeeping, accounting support, or a finance-related VA role

• Solid QuickBooks Online experience — you can enter transactions, reconcile accounts, and pull basic reports without being trained from zero

• Experience with Hostaway, AirBnB, VRBO, 

• Strong Excel skills — comfortable building and maintaining spreadsheets, formatting reports, using basic formulas

• Excellent written English — your
s and documents are clear and professional

• Detail-oriented and deadline-driven — you do not let things fall through the cracks

• Comfortable working independently and managing your own task list without daily hand-holding

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional working environment

• Experience supporting a US-based real estate, construction, or property management company

• Familiarity with multi-entity accounting (different companies with separate books)

• Experience with Deel, InvestNext, or similar platforms

• Background in accounts payable or vendor management



40 Hours per week - 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM Chicago time (CST)

title: Experienced QuickBooks Bookkeeper Virtual Assistant – Amazon Expertise (Day/Night Shifts)
description:
We are a multi-million-dollar e-commerce company in the USA.
