title: Social Media Marketing & Viral Script Expert
description:
Here's the complete, final job post with everything included:



---



**Job Title:** Social Media Manager – Instagram Growth Specialist (Cleaning Industry)



**Job Type:** Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



---



**About Us**



Greater Phoenix Cleaning is a premium residential, commercial, Airbnb turnover, and post-construction cleaning company serving the Greater Phoenix, Arizona area. We are on a mission to become the most recognized and trusted cleaning brand in Phoenix — and we need a social media powerhouse to help us get there.



We don't just clean homes. We give busy professionals and upper-middle-class families their time back. That's our brand. That's our promise.



---



**The Role**



We are looking for a Social Media Manager who is genuinely **obsessed** with Instagram and social media growth. This is not a part-time hobby — this is a full-time commitment to building a dominant online presence for our brand in the Greater Phoenix market.



You will be responsible for **6 high-quality posts per day, 7 days per week** across our Instagram account. Every single post must deliver real value, reflect current algorithm trends, and speak directly to our ideal customer and our ideal tea
mber.



---



**What You'll Be Posting About**



Content should rotate across the following pillars:



- Cleaning tips, techniques, and best practices for residential homes

- Commercial cleaning insights and standards

- Airbnb and short-term rental turnover strategies

- Post-construction cleanup processes and safety

- Health awareness — allergens, dust, mold, VOCs, and air quality

- Product education — what works, what's safe, what's most effective

- Industry trends and innovations in the cleaning world

- Recruitment content targeting experienced, professional cleaners in the Phoenix area who want to earn serious income

- Trust-building and authority content positioning Greater Phoenix Cleaning as the **#1 go-to cleaning company** in the area



---



**Your Primary Goals**



1. **Attract the Ideal Customer** — Upper-middle-class homeowners, busy professionals, real estate investors, and Airbnb hosts in the Greater Phoenix area who value their time and want premium, reliable cleaning services

2. **Attract A-Player Cleaning Professionals** — Experienced cleaners in the Phoenix area looking for a company that will pay well and treat them right

3. **Build Omnipresence** — We want Greater Phoenix Cleaning to be *everywhere* in the Phoenix market online



---



**What We're Looking For**



- Proven experience growing Instagram accounts — **you must provide examples of previous clients you have helped grow or go viral**

- Deep understanding of the Instagram algorithm and how it evolves — you study this constantly

- Ability to create or direct the creation of high-quality, visually compelling content (Reels, carousels, static posts, Stories)

- Strong English copywriting skills — captions must be engaging, clear, and on-brand

- Ability to research and translate cleaning industry topics into educational, shareable content

- Self-motivated and consistent — 6 posts per day, 7 days per week, no exceptions

- Experience with content scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Meta Business Suite, etc.)

- Understanding of hashtag strategy, SEO for Instagram, and engagement tactics



---



**Nice to Have**



- Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

- Experience growing local service business accounts

- Familiarity with Canva or Adobe tools for graphics

- Experience with short-form video (Reels)



---



**What We Offer**



- Competitive base pay (based on experience and proven results)

- **Performance incentive pay** — bonuses for new clients and new cleaning tea
mbers that join as a direct result of social media efforts

- Long-term role for the right candidate — we want someone who grows with us

- The chance to build something real and become the social media architect behind one of Phoenix's top cleaning brands



---



**How to Apply**



Please submit the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your social media background

2. **Links to 2–3 Instagram accounts you have managed** — show us growth, viral content, or engagement results

3. Your proposed content strategy or content pillars for a cleaning company Instagram page

4. Your availability and rate expectation

5. **A 2–3 minute personalized Loom video addressed directly to Ross** — introduce yourself, tell us why you're the absolute best fit for **Greater Phoenix Cleaning**, and show us your personality. Generic videos will be disqualified. Make it count.



**Applications without a portfolio AND a Loom video will not be considered.**



---



We're building something big in Phoenix. If you're the kind of person who wakes up thinking about content, studies the algorithm for fun, and has a track record of making brands impossible to ignore — we want to talk.

title: Part-Time Cold Outreach Strategy Expert for Photography Business (Real Estate Focus)
description:
About Lucchesi Media

Lucchesi Media (
) is a professional photography business delivering high-quality visual content for real estate marketing. We empower realtors and property investors to showcase their listings and close deals faster. We’re seeking to grow our client base through a targeted cold outreach strategy and need an expert to lead this effort.  

About the Role

We’re hiring an experienced Cold Outreach Strategy Expert to develop and execute a multi-channel cold outreach campaign targeting high-transaction-volume realtors and property investors. You’ll focus on Instagram, LinkedIn, and
 outreach, with a strong emphasis on
 deliverability to ensure our messages reach the primary inbox. This is a part-time, remote role requiring availability during US business hours (8 AM–5 PM PST) to align lead generation activities with our target audience.  

You’ll work closely with our founder to build a scalable outreach process that drives new client leads for Lucchesi Media. We’re looking for a proactive, results-oriented professional with deep expertise in B2B lead generation.  



Key Responsibilities  

Strategy Development: Design a cold outreach strategy for Instagram DMs, LinkedIn messaging, and
 campaigns tailored to realtors and investors.  



 Outreach: Write and optimize cold
 campaigns with persuasive copy, ensuring high deliverability (e.g., avoiding spam filters, managing domain warm-ups).  



Social Media Outreach: Execute personalized outreach on Instagram and LinkedIn, engaging prospects and building relationships.  



Lead Generation: Source and qualify leads (e.g., high-volume realtors, property investors) using tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, or similar.  



 Deliverability: Manage
 infrastructure (e.g., SPF, DKIM, DMARC) and use tools like Smartlead or Instantly to maximize inbox placement.  



CRM Management: Track leads, follow-ups, and conversions in a CRM (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) for streamlined pipeline management.  



Reporting: Deliver weekly reports on outreach metrics (e.g., open rates, reply rates, appointments booked) with recommendations for improvement.



Requirements  

Experience: 3+ years in cold outreach, lead generation, or B2B digital marketing, with a proven track record of successful campaigns.  



 Expertise: Advanced knowledge of
 deliverability (e.g., SPF, DKIM, DMARC, warm-up processes) and proficiency with tools like Smartlead, Instantly, or Lemlist.  



Social Media Skills: Expertise in Instagram and LinkedIn outreach, including personalized messaging and audience research.  



Real Estate Knowledge: Familiarity with the real estate industry (e.g., targeting realtors or investors) is highly preferred.  



Copywriting: Exceptional ability to craft professional, conversion-driven outreach messages.  



Tech-Savvy: Proficient with CRMs (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive), lead sourcing tools (e.g., Apollo, ZoomInfo), and automation platforms (e.g., Zapier).  



Availability: Able to work part-time (20–25 hours/week) during 8 AM–5 PM PST to align with US-based lead generation.  



Communication: Fluent in English (written and verbal) with meticulous attention to detail.  



Mindset: Self-starter, problem-solver, and results-driven, with a passion for generating leads.



Nice-to-Haves  

Experience with real estate marketing or photography business outreach.  



Success targeting high-net-worth or B2B audiences in the US.  



Familiarity with tools like GoHighLevel or Klaviyo for marketing automation.



Why Join Lucchesi Media?  

Meaningful Impact: Drive growth for a creative photography business helping realtors and investors succeed.  



Flexible Role: Work remotely with a part-time schedule, tailored to US hours.  



Performance Bonuses: Earn bonuses for surpassing lead generation or appointment-setting targets.  



Collaborative Environment: Partner directly with our founder in a supportive, innovative setting.



Apply Here:

title: Minimalist CapCut Video Editor for Short-Form Content
description:
About Me & The Brand:

I am a former Big Tech professional who took a career break to solo parent and spend time with my family. My content focuses on modern fatherhood, marriage, and my experiences as a South Asian man.



My brand is the "Anti-Guru." I am not giving advice or life hacks. I make highly relatable, authentic, and reflective videos. My formats include "Talking-Head (Reflection)" where I am thinking out loud about something I've already lived through, and "Quiet Reflection" where I let people overhear a thought I'm still sitting with, with no lesson or resolution.



The Role:

I am looking for a reliable, creative video editor to take over my post-production so I can focus on filming. You will be editing 10-15 short-form videos (Reels/TikToks/Shorts) per week. All editing must be done in CapCut.



The Style (CRITICAL):

If your primary editing style is "Alex Hormozi" (flashing yellow/green text, bouncing emojis, aggressive zoom-ins, and whoosh sound effects every 2 seconds), please do not apply. I need an editor who understands restraint, pacing, and human emotion.



Captions: Clean, minimalist text overlays (auto-captions are fine, but they must use a simple, elegant font with no bouncing animations).



Pacing: The cuts need to feel natural and conversational, not hyper-kinetic.



B-Roll/VO: Ability to take my voiceovers and lay them cleanly over cinematic or raw "day in the life" B-roll footage.



Music: Ability to select subtle, ambient, or lo-fi background music that sets the mood without overpowering my voice.



Requirements:



Expertise in CapCut.



Strong understanding of English pacing and conversational pauses.



Ability to turn around 2-3 short videos per day (part-time load).



Excellent communication and reliability.



How to Apply:

To prove you have read this entire post and have attention to detail, please start your application with the phrase: "Minimalist Editor."



Please include 2-3 links to previous short-form videos you have edited. I am specifically looking for examples that show clean, storytelling-focused editing, not hyper-fast marketing ads.

title: Social Media Growth Specialist
description:

Compensation

title: Editor
description:
Video Editor  -  Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $3–$8+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $60 per video!!

Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand. 



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow. 



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of  your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded. 



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance. 

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4. 

+ BONUSES! 



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance. 

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST -  We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new. 



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor? 



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn 



How to Apply 

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of  your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
We’re searching for an experienced assistant to execute on day-to-day activities, administrative tasks, and special projects for our CEO. 

This position touches every corner of the CEO’s life and business, which means the right person will have a passion for coming alongside the CEO and putting the infrastructure in place to bring his big vision into reality.

It’s a big role, and we need someone who has the ability to ramp up quickly when it comes to new information and learning new things. Therefore, we’re looking for someone with deep career ambitions as an assistant to the CEO and someone who truly believes in the value of this role as their calling.



Projects for you might include:

• Acting as the liaison between the CEO and his team-leaders across multiple businesses,

• Owning the logistics of important personal purchases

• Being the point person for the lawyers, partners, accountants, and more

• Coordinating travel arrangements

•Managing his calendar and inbox



Among many, many other things. 



Over time, the goal is that you’ll become an extension of our CEO by having the ability to anticipate his needs, see around the corner, and remember things before he does. Because of this, the ability to build trust quickly is critical. We desire a high level of professionalism, confidentiality, discretion and judgement, in both written and verbal communication.



Who exactly are we looking for?



In short, does this sound like you? Someone that is a(n):

• Communicator: You have excellent written and verbal communication.

• Trustworthy: A professional with a high level of discretion and honesty.

• Adaptable and Detail-Oriented: Able to work in a fast-paced environment and keep up with a proactive employer who has a clear vision and high standards.

• Dedicated and Reliable: Committed to the role personally, managing tasks independently without delegating to external teams.

• Experienced and Confident: Possesses the experience to manage priorities effectively, while confidently setting boundaries when necessary.

• Assertive and Professional: Able to communicate clearly and maintain professional boundaries, ensuring tasks are completed in a manner that aligns with both comfort and quality standards.



Why you?



As a minimum, you have:

• You have at least 1+ years of experience supporting a CEO or executive in the past. This is a must in this role, as you’ll be able to pattern match previous experiences and understand everyday shifting tasks and priorities are inherent in supporting an executive.

• You can hold your own. You make decisions decisively, and are able to take very direct feedback.

• You are a rock-solid communicator. Your present information clearly and with no errors, whether that is in written or verbal communication.

• You’re highly-adaptable and flexible, as this role is ever changing in its nature as new projects come to light as such.

• You’ll be contributing to projects related to finance and legal elements, so a strong appetite and experience in financial and legal literacy is desired.

• You thrive in fast-paced environments, with tight deadlines, with a rigorous eye for detail and accuracy

• You take a lot of pride in your outcomes, whether that’s booking just the right dinner reservation, or facilitating the final signing on a business acquisition.



To provide, more insight, the role may include, but is not limited to the following tasks:

• Meeting with the executive on a regular basis

• Compiling daily reports and communications so you can stay on the same page

• Manage and update the executive’s calendar, including scheduling meetings, patient-related appointments, internal check-ins, and personal events

• Coordinate travel, lodging, and itineraries for conferences, seminars, and events

• Screen, prioritize, and respond to
s, messages, and calls on behalf of the executive

• Draft, proofread, and send communications, memos, and announcements

• Prepare agendas, meeting materials, and presentations for leadership or tea
etings

• Take meeting notes and ensure follow-up on action items and deadlines

• Track and submit executive’s expense reports and reconcile clinic-related credit card charges

• Assist with budget tracking and light bookkeeping support for the executive’s initiatives

• Organize and maintain digital and physical files, records, and clinic documents

• Handle confidential information with discretion and ensure HIPAA compliance when needed

• Coordinate projects across departments and support clinic-wide initiatives

• Liaise with vendors, partners, and contractors, including medical equipment reps and service providers

• Prepare reports or dashboards for clinic metrics, KPIs, and executive summaries

• Manage follow-up communications with clinic partners

• Plan and coordinate team events, off sites, and leadership retreats

• Monitor and streamline executive workflows and proactively solve logistical bottlenecks

• Maintain clinic licenses, renewals, contracts, and other compliance documents as needed

• Anticipate needs and handle tasks without requiring detailed direction



Tech Requirements:

• Computer – Minimum i5 processor (or equivalent) with at least 8GB RAM.

• Internet Speed – Minimum 50 MBPS Download Speed, preferably with a backup connection to ensure uninterrupted work.



Schedule:

• Full time, 12:00PM to 8:00PM Pacific Time Zone

• Monday to Saturday



Pay:

• $1,000 - $1300 USD/month



Hiring Process:

• Phone Interview

• Executive Practical (2hrs)

• Possible Cognitive Assessment

• Interview with the Executive

• Hiring Decision Made and Communicated



How to Apply:

• Please include a link to your resume and a short introduction video along with your application. Thank you.
